mbh_01.001.000 nārāyaṇaṁ namaskr̥tya naraṁ caiva narottamam
mbh_01.001.000 devīṁ sarasvatīṁ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
mbh_01.001.001 lomaharṣaṇaputra ugraśravāḥ sūtaḥ paurāṇiko naimiṣāraṇye śaunakasya kulapater dvādaśavārṣike satre
mbh_01.001.002 samāsīnān abhyagacchad brahmarṣīn saṁśitavratān
mbh_01.001.002 vinayāvanato bhūtvā kadā cit sūtanandanaḥ
mbh_01.001.003 tam āśramam anuprāptaṁ naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ
mbh_01.001.003 citrāḥ śrotuṁ kathās tatra parivavrus tapasvinaḥ
mbh_01.001.004 abhivādya munīṁs tāṁs tu sarvān eva kr̥tāñjaliḥ
mbh_01.001.004 apr̥cchat sa tapovr̥ddhiṁ sadbhiś caivābhinanditaḥ
mbh_01.001.005 atha teṣūpaviṣṭeṣu sarveṣv eva tapasviṣu
mbh_01.001.005 nirdiṣṭam āsanaṁ bheje vinayāl lomaharṣaṇiḥ

mbh_01.001.006 athāpr̥cchad r̥ṣis tatra kaś cit prastāvayan kathāḥ
mbh_01.001.007 kuta āgamyate saute kva cāyaṁ vihr̥tas tvayā

mbh_01.001.008 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.001.008 janamejayasya rājarṣeḥ sarpasatre mahātmanaḥ

mbh_01.001.009 kr̥ṣṇadvaipāyanaproktāḥ supuṇyā vividhāḥ kathāḥ
mbh_01.001.009 kathitāś cāpi vidhivad yā vaiśaṁpāyanena vai
mbh_01.001.010 śrutvāhaṁ tā vicitrārthā mahābhāratasaṁśritāḥ
mbh_01.001.010 bahūni saṁparikramya tīrthāny āyatanāni ca
mbh_01.001.011 samantapañcakaṁ nāma puṇyaṁ dvijaniṣevitam

mbh_01.001.011 pāṇḍavānāṁ kurūṇāṁ ca sarveṣāṁ ca mahīkṣitām

mbh_01.001.012 āyuṣmantaḥ sarva eva brahmabhūtā hi me matāḥ
mbh_01.001.013 asmin yajñe mahābhāgāḥ sūryapāvakavarcasaḥ
mbh_01.001.013 kr̥tābhiṣekāḥ śucayaḥ kr̥tajapyā hutāgnayaḥ
mbh_01.001.013 bhavanta āsate svasthā bravīmi kim ahaṁ dvijāḥ

mbh_01.001.029 avyaktaṁ kāraṇaṁ sūkṣmaṁ yat tat sadasadātmakam
mbh_01.001.030 yasmāt pitāmaho jajñe prabhur ekaḥ prajāpatiḥ

mbh_01.001.032 viśvedevās tathādityā vasavo ’thāśvināv api
mbh_01.001.033 yakṣāḥ sādhyāḥ piśācāś ca guhyakāḥ pitaras tathā
mbh_01.001.033 tataḥ prasūtā vidvāṁsaḥ śiṣṭā brahmarṣayo ’malāḥ
mbh_01.001.034 rājarṣayaś ca bahavaḥ sarvaiḥ samuditā guṇaiḥ
mbh_01.001.034 āpo dyauḥ pr̥thivī vāyur antarikṣaṁ diśas tathā

mbh_01.001.063 tato ’nyebhyo ’nurūpebhyaḥ śiṣyebhyaḥ pradadau prabhuḥ
mbh_01.001.064 nārado ’śrāvayad devān asito devalaḥ pitr̥̄n
mbh_01.001.064 gandharvayakṣarakṣāṁsi śrāvayām āsa vai śukaḥ
mbh_01.001.065 duryodhano manyumayo mahādrumaḥ; skandhaḥ karṇaḥ śakunis tasya śākhāḥ
mbh_01.001.065 duḥśāsanaḥ puṣpaphale samr̥ddhe; mūlaṁ rājā dhr̥tarāṣṭro ’manīṣī
mbh_01.001.066 yudhiṣṭhiro dharmamayo mahādrumaḥ; skandho ’rjuno bhīmaseno ’sya śākhāḥ
mbh_01.001.066 mādrīsutau puṣpaphale samr̥ddhe; mūlaṁ kr̥ṣṇo brahma ca brāhmaṇāś ca
mbh_01.001.067 pāṇḍur jitvā bahūn deśān yudhā vikramaṇena ca
mbh_01.001.067 araṇye mr̥gayāśīlo nyavasat sajanas tadā
mbh_01.001.068 mr̥gavyavāyanidhane kr̥cchrāṁ prāpa sa āpadam
mbh_01.001.068 janmaprabhr̥ti pārthānāṁ tatrācāravidhikramaḥ
mbh_01.001.069 mātror abhyupapattiś ca dharmopaniṣadaṁ prati
mbh_01.001.069 dharmasya vāyoḥ śakrasya devayoś ca tathāśvinoḥ
mbh_01.001.070 tāpasaiḥ saha saṁvr̥ddhā mātr̥bhyāṁ parirakṣitāḥ
mbh_01.001.070 medhyāraṇyeṣu puṇyeṣu mahatām āśrameṣu ca
mbh_01.001.071 r̥ṣibhiś ca tadānītā dhārtarāṣṭrān prati svayam
mbh_01.001.071 śiśavaś cābhirūpāś ca jaṭilā brahmacāriṇaḥ
mbh_01.001.072 putrāś ca bhrātaraś ceme śiṣyāś ca suhr̥daś ca vaḥ
mbh_01.001.072 pāṇḍavā eta ity uktvā munayo ’ntarhitās tataḥ
mbh_01.001.073 tāṁs tair niveditān dr̥ṣṭvā pāṇḍavān kauravās tadā
mbh_01.001.073 śiṣṭāś ca varṇāḥ paurā ye te harṣāc cukruśur bhr̥śam
mbh_01.001.074 āhuḥ ke cin na tasyaite tasyaita iti cāpare
mbh_01.001.074 yadā ciramr̥taḥ pāṇḍuḥ kathaṁ tasyeti cāpare
mbh_01.001.075 svāgataṁ sarvathā diṣṭyā pāṇḍoḥ paśyāma saṁtatim
mbh_01.001.075 ucyatāṁ svāgatam iti vāco ’śrūyanta sarvaśaḥ
mbh_01.001.076 tasminn uparate śabde diśaḥ sarvā vinādayan
mbh_01.001.076 antarhitānāṁ bhūtānāṁ nisvanas tumulo ’bhavat
mbh_01.001.077 puṣpavr̥ṣṭiḥ śubhā gandhāḥ śaṅkhadundubhinisvanāḥ
mbh_01.001.077 āsan praveśe pārthānāṁ tad adbhutam ivābhavat
mbh_01.001.078 tatprītyā caiva sarveṣāṁ paurāṇāṁ harṣasaṁbhavaḥ
mbh_01.001.078 śabda āsīn mahāṁs tatra divaspr̥k kīrtivardhanaḥ
mbh_01.001.079 te ’py adhītyākhilān vedāñ śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca
mbh_01.001.079 nyavasan pāṇḍavās tatra pūjitā akutobhayāḥ
mbh_01.001.080 yudhiṣṭhirasya śaucena prītāḥ prakr̥tayo ’bhavan
mbh_01.001.080 dhr̥tyā ca bhīmasenasya vikrameṇārjunasya ca
mbh_01.001.081 guruśuśrūṣayā kuntyā yamayor vinayena ca
mbh_01.001.081 tutoṣa lokaḥ sakalas teṣāṁ śauryaguṇena ca
mbh_01.001.082 samavāye tato rājñāṁ kanyāṁ bhartr̥svayaṁvarām
mbh_01.001.082 prāptavān arjunaḥ kr̥ṣṇāṁ kr̥tvā karma suduṣkaram
mbh_01.001.083 tataḥ prabhr̥ti loke ’smin pūjyaḥ sarvadhanuṣmatām
mbh_01.001.083 āditya iva duṣprekṣyaḥ samareṣv api cābhavat
mbh_01.001.084 sa sarvān pārthivāñ jitvā sarvāṁś ca mahato gaṇān
mbh_01.001.084 ājahārārjuno rājñe rājasūyaṁ mahākratum
mbh_01.001.085 annavān dakṣiṇāvāṁś ca sarvaiḥ samudito guṇaiḥ
mbh_01.001.085 yudhiṣṭhireṇa saṁprāpto rājasūyo mahākratuḥ
mbh_01.001.086 sunayād vāsudevasya bhīmārjunabalena ca
mbh_01.001.086 ghātayitvā jarāsaṁdhaṁ caidyaṁ ca balagarvitam
mbh_01.001.087 duryodhanam upāgacchann arhaṇāni tatas tataḥ
mbh_01.001.087 maṇikāñcanaratnāni gohastyaśvadhanāni ca
mbh_01.001.088 samr̥ddhāṁ tāṁ tathā dr̥ṣṭvā pāṇḍavānāṁ tadā śriyam
mbh_01.001.088 īrṣyāsamutthaḥ sumahāṁs tasya manyur ajāyata
mbh_01.001.089 vimānapratimāṁ cāpi mayena sukr̥tāṁ sabhām
mbh_01.001.089 pāṇḍavānām upahr̥tāṁ sa dr̥ṣṭvā paryatapyata
mbh_01.001.090 yatrāvahasitaś cāsīt praskandann iva saṁbhramāt
mbh_01.001.090 pratyakṣaṁ vāsudevasya bhīmenānabhijātavat
mbh_01.001.091 sa bhogān vividhān bhuñjan ratnāni vividhāni ca
mbh_01.001.091 kathito dhr̥tarāṣṭrasya vivarṇo hariṇaḥ kr̥śaḥ
mbh_01.001.092 anvajānāt tato dyūtaṁ dhr̥tarāṣṭraḥ sutapriyaḥ
mbh_01.001.092 tac chrutvā vāsudevasya kopaḥ samabhavan mahān
mbh_01.001.093 nātiprītamanāś cāsīd vivādāṁś cānvamodata
mbh_01.001.093 dyūtādīn anayān ghorān pravr̥ddhāṁś cāpy upaikṣata
mbh_01.001.094 nirasya viduraṁ droṇaṁ bhīṣmaṁ śāradvataṁ kr̥pam
mbh_01.001.094 vigrahe tumule tasminn ahan kṣatraṁ parasparam
mbh_01.001.095 jayatsu pāṇḍuputreṣu śrutvā sumahad apriyam
mbh_01.001.095 duryodhanamataṁ jñātvā karṇasya śakunes tathā
mbh_01.001.095 dhr̥tarāṣṭraś ciraṁ dhyātvā saṁjayaṁ vākyam abravīt
mbh_01.001.096 śr̥ṇu saṁjaya me sarvaṁ na me ’sūyitum arhasi
mbh_01.001.096 śrutavān asi medhāvī buddhimān prājñasaṁmataḥ
mbh_01.001.097 na vigrahe mama matir na ca prīye kurukṣaye
mbh_01.001.097 na me viśeṣaḥ putreṣu sveṣu pāṇḍusuteṣu ca
mbh_01.001.098 vr̥ddhaṁ mām abhyasūyanti putrā manyuparāyaṇāḥ
mbh_01.001.098 ahaṁ tv acakṣuḥ kārpaṇyāt putraprītyā sahāmi tat
mbh_01.001.098 muhyantaṁ cānumuhyāmi duryodhanam acetanam
mbh_01.001.099 rājasūye śriyaṁ dr̥ṣṭvā pāṇḍavasya mahaujasaḥ
mbh_01.001.099 tac cāvahasanaṁ prāpya sabhārohaṇadarśane
mbh_01.001.100 amarṣitaḥ svayaṁ jetum aśaktaḥ pāṇḍavān raṇe
mbh_01.001.100 nirutsāhaś ca saṁprāptuṁ śriyam akṣatriyo yathā
mbh_01.001.100 gāndhārarājasahitaś chadmadyūtam amantrayat
mbh_01.001.101 tatra yad yad yathā jñātaṁ mayā saṁjaya tac chr̥ṇu
mbh_01.001.101 śrutvā hi mama vākyāni buddhyā yuktāni tattvataḥ
mbh_01.001.101 tato jñāsyasi māṁ saute prajñācakṣuṣam ity uta
mbh_01.001.102 yadāśrauṣaṁ dhanur āyamya citraṁ; viddhaṁ lakṣyaṁ pātitaṁ vai pr̥thivyām
mbh_01.001.102 kr̥ṣṇāṁ hr̥tāṁ paśyatāṁ sarvarājñāṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.103 yadāśrauṣaṁ dvārakāyāṁ subhadrāṁ; prasahyoḍhāṁ mādhavīm arjunena
mbh_01.001.103 indraprasthaṁ vr̥ṣṇivīrau ca yātau; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.104 yadāśrauṣaṁ devarājaṁ pravr̥ṣṭaṁ; śarair divyair vāritaṁ cārjunena
mbh_01.001.104 agniṁ tathā tarpitaṁ khāṇḍave ca; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.105 yadāśrauṣaṁ hr̥tarājyaṁ yudhiṣṭhiraṁ; parājitaṁ saubalenākṣavatyām
mbh_01.001.105 anvāgataṁ bhrātr̥bhir aprameyais; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.106 yadāśrauṣaṁ draupadīm aśrukaṇṭhīṁ; sabhāṁ nītāṁ duḥkhitām ekavastrām
mbh_01.001.106 rajasvalāṁ nāthavatīm anāthavat; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.107 yadāśrauṣaṁ vividhās tāta ceṣṭā; dharmātmanāṁ prasthitānāṁ vanāya
mbh_01.001.107 jyeṣṭhaprītyā kliśyatāṁ pāṇḍavānāṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.108 yadāśrauṣaṁ snātakānāṁ sahasrair; anvāgataṁ dharmarājaṁ vanastham
mbh_01.001.108 bhikṣābhujāṁ brāhmaṇānāṁ mahātmanāṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.109 yadāśrauṣam arjuno devadevaṁ; kirātarūpaṁ tryambakaṁ toṣya yuddhe
mbh_01.001.109 avāpa tat pāśupataṁ mahāstraṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.110 yadāśrauṣaṁ tridivasthaṁ dhanaṁjayaṁ; śakrāt sākṣād divyam astraṁ yathāvat
mbh_01.001.110 adhīyānaṁ śaṁsitaṁ satyasaṁdhaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.111 yadāśrauṣaṁ vaiśravaṇena sārdhaṁ; samāgataṁ bhīmam anyāṁś ca pārthān
mbh_01.001.111 tasmin deśe mānuṣāṇām agamye; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.112 yadāśrauṣaṁ ghoṣayātrāgatānāṁ; bandhaṁ gandharvair mokṣaṇaṁ cārjunena
mbh_01.001.112 sveṣāṁ sutānāṁ karṇabuddhau ratānāṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.113 yadāśrauṣaṁ yakṣarūpeṇa dharmaṁ; samāgataṁ dharmarājena sūta
mbh_01.001.113 praśnān uktān vibruvantaṁ ca samyak; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.114 yadāśrauṣaṁ māmakānāṁ variṣṭhān; dhanaṁjayenaikarathena bhagnān
mbh_01.001.114 virāṭarāṣṭre vasatā mahātmanā; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.115 yadāśrauṣaṁ satkr̥tāṁ matsyarājñā; sutāṁ dattām uttarām arjunāya
mbh_01.001.115 tāṁ cārjunaḥ pratyagr̥hṇāt sutārthe; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.116 yadāśrauṣaṁ nirjitasyādhanasya; pravrājitasya svajanāt pracyutasya
mbh_01.001.116 akṣauhiṇīḥ sapta yudhiṣṭhirasya; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.117 yadāśrauṣaṁ naranārāyaṇau tau; kr̥ṣṇārjunau vadato nāradasya
mbh_01.001.117 ahaṁ draṣṭā brahmaloke sadeti; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.118 yadāśrauṣaṁ mādhavaṁ vāsudevaṁ; sarvātmanā pāṇḍavārthe niviṣṭam
mbh_01.001.118 yasyemāṁ gāṁ vikramam ekam āhus; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.119 yadāśrauṣaṁ karṇaduryodhanābhyāṁ; buddhiṁ kr̥tāṁ nigrahe keśavasya
mbh_01.001.119 taṁ cātmānaṁ bahudhā darśayānaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.120 yadāśrauṣaṁ vāsudeve prayāte; rathasyaikām agratas tiṣṭhamānām
mbh_01.001.120 ārtāṁ pr̥thāṁ sāntvitāṁ keśavena; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.121 yadāśrauṣaṁ mantriṇaṁ vāsudevaṁ; tathā bhīṣmaṁ śāṁtanavaṁ ca teṣām
mbh_01.001.121 bhāradvājaṁ cāśiṣo ’nubruvāṇaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.122 yadāśrauṣaṁ karṇa uvāca bhīṣmaṁ; nāhaṁ yotsye yudhyamāne tvayīti
mbh_01.001.122 hitvā senām apacakrāma caiva; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.123 yadāśrauṣaṁ vāsudevārjunau tau; tathā dhanur gāṇḍivam aprameyam
mbh_01.001.123 trīṇy ugravīryāṇi samāgatāni; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.124 yadāśrauṣaṁ kaśmalenābhipanne; rathopasthe sīdamāne ’rjune vai
mbh_01.001.124 kr̥ṣṇaṁ lokān darśayānaṁ śarīre; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.125 yadāśrauṣaṁ bhīṣmam amitrakarśanaṁ; nighnantam ājāv ayutaṁ rathānām
mbh_01.001.125 naiṣāṁ kaś cid vadhyate dr̥śyarūpas; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.126 yadāśrauṣaṁ bhīṣmam atyantaśūraṁ; hataṁ pārthenāhaveṣv apradhr̥ṣyam
mbh_01.001.126 śikhaṇḍinaṁ purataḥ sthāpayitvā; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.127 yadāśrauṣaṁ śaratalpe śayānaṁ; vr̥ddhaṁ vīraṁ sāditaṁ citrapuṅkhaiḥ
mbh_01.001.127 bhīṣmaṁ kr̥tvā somakān alpaśeṣāṁs; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.128 yadāśrauṣaṁ śāṁtanave śayāne; pānīyārthe coditenārjunena
mbh_01.001.128 bhūmiṁ bhittvā tarpitaṁ tatra bhīṣmaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.129 yadāśrauṣaṁ śukrasūryau ca yuktau; kaunteyānām anulomau jayāya
mbh_01.001.129 nityaṁ cāsmāñ śvāpadā vyābhaṣantas; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.130 yadā droṇo vividhān astramārgān; vidarśayan samare citrayodhī
mbh_01.001.130 na pāṇḍavāñ śreṣṭhatamān nihanti; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.131 yadāśrauṣaṁ cāsmadīyān mahārathān; vyavasthitān arjunasyāntakāya
mbh_01.001.131 saṁśaptakān nihatān arjunena; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.132 yadāśrauṣaṁ vyūham abhedyam anyair; bhāradvājenāttaśastreṇa guptam
mbh_01.001.132 bhittvā saubhadraṁ vīram ekaṁ praviṣṭaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.133 yadābhimanyuṁ parivārya bālaṁ; sarve hatvā hr̥ṣṭarūpā babhūvuḥ
mbh_01.001.133 mahārathāḥ pārtham aśaknuvantas; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.134 yadāśrauṣam abhimanyuṁ nihatya; harṣān mūḍhān krośato dhārtarāṣṭrān
mbh_01.001.134 krodhaṁ muktaṁ saindhave cārjunena; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.135 yadāśrauṣaṁ saindhavārthe pratijñāṁ; pratijñātāṁ tadvadhāyārjunena
mbh_01.001.135 satyāṁ nistīrṇāṁ śatrumadhye ca tena; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.136 yadāśrauṣaṁ śrāntahaye dhanaṁjaye; muktvā hayān pāyayitvopavr̥ttān
mbh_01.001.136 punar yuktvā vāsudevaṁ prayātaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.137 yadāśrauṣaṁ vāhaneṣv āśvasatsu; rathopasthe tiṣṭhatā gāṇḍivena
mbh_01.001.137 sarvān yodhān vāritān arjunena; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.138 yadāśrauṣaṁ nāgabalair durutsahaṁ; droṇānīkaṁ yuyudhānaṁ pramathya
mbh_01.001.138 yātaṁ vārṣṇeyaṁ yatra tau kr̥ṣṇapārthau; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.139 yadāśrauṣaṁ karṇam āsādya muktaṁ; vadhād bhīmaṁ kutsayitvā vacobhiḥ
mbh_01.001.139 dhanuṣkoṭyā tudya karṇena vīraṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.140 yadā droṇaḥ kr̥tavarmā kr̥paś ca; karṇo drauṇir madrarājaś ca śūraḥ
mbh_01.001.140 amarṣayan saindhavaṁ vadhyamānaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.141 yadāśrauṣaṁ devarājena dattāṁ; divyāṁ śaktiṁ vyaṁsitāṁ mādhavena
mbh_01.001.141 ghaṭotkace rākṣase ghorarūpe; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.142 yadāśrauṣaṁ karṇaghaṭotkacābhyāṁ; yuddhe muktāṁ sūtaputreṇa śaktim
mbh_01.001.142 yayā vadhyaḥ samare savyasācī; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.143 yadāśrauṣaṁ droṇam ācāryam ekaṁ; dhr̥ṣṭadyumnenābhyatikramya dharmam
mbh_01.001.143 rathopasthe prāyagataṁ viśastaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.144 yadāśrauṣaṁ drauṇinā dvairathasthaṁ; mādrīputraṁ nakulaṁ lokamadhye
mbh_01.001.144 samaṁ yuddhe pāṇḍavaṁ yudhyamānaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.145 yadā droṇe nihate droṇaputro; nārāyaṇaṁ divyam astraṁ vikurvan
mbh_01.001.145 naiṣām antaṁ gatavān pāṇḍavānāṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.146 yadāśrauṣaṁ karṇam atyantaśūraṁ; hataṁ pārthenāhaveṣv apradhr̥ṣyam
mbh_01.001.146 tasmin bhrātr̥̄ṇāṁ vigrahe devaguhye; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.147 yadāśrauṣaṁ droṇaputraṁ kr̥paṁ ca; duḥśāsanaṁ kr̥tavarmāṇam ugram
mbh_01.001.147 yudhiṣṭhiraṁ śūnyam adharṣayantaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.148 yadāśrauṣaṁ nihataṁ madrarājaṁ; raṇe śūraṁ dharmarājena sūta
mbh_01.001.148 sadā saṁgrāme spardhate yaḥ sa kr̥ṣṇaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.149 yadāśrauṣaṁ kalahadyūtamūlaṁ; māyābalaṁ saubalaṁ pāṇḍavena
mbh_01.001.149 hataṁ saṁgrāme sahadevena pāpaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya

mbh_01.001.151 yadāśrauṣaṁ pāṇḍavāṁs tiṣṭhamānān; gaṅgāhrade vāsudevena sārdham

mbh_01.001.153 kr̥taṁ bībhatsam ayaśasyaṁ ca karma; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.154 yadāśrauṣaṁ bhīmasenānuyātena; aśvatthāmnā paramāstraṁ prayuktam
mbh_01.001.154 kruddhenaiṣīkam avadhīd yena garbhaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.155 yadāśrauṣaṁ brahmaśiro ’rjunena; muktaṁ svastīty astram astreṇa śāntam
mbh_01.001.155 aśvatthāmnā maṇiratnaṁ ca dattaṁ; tadā nāśaṁse vijayāya saṁjaya
mbh_01.001.156 yadāśrauṣaṁ droṇaputreṇa garbhe; vairāṭyā vai pātyamāne mahāstre
mbh_01.001.156 dvaipāyanaḥ keśavo droṇaputraṁ; paraspareṇābhiśāpaiḥ śaśāpa
mbh_01.001.157 śocyā gāndhārī putrapautrair vihīnā; tathā vadhvaḥ pitr̥bhir bhrātr̥bhiś ca
mbh_01.001.157 kr̥taṁ kāryaṁ duṣkaraṁ pāṇḍaveyaiḥ; prāptaṁ rājyam asapatnaṁ punas taiḥ
mbh_01.001.158 kaṣṭaṁ yuddhe daśa śeṣāḥ śrutā me; trayo ’smākaṁ pāṇḍavānāṁ ca sapta
mbh_01.001.158 dvyūnā viṁśatir āhatākṣauhiṇīnāṁ; tasmin saṁgrāme vigrahe kṣatriyāṇām
mbh_01.001.159 tamasā tv abhyavastīrṇo moha āviśatīva mām
mbh_01.001.159 saṁjñāṁ nopalabhe sūta mano vihvalatīva me
mbh_01.001.160 ity uktvā dhr̥tarāṣṭro ’tha vilapya bahuduḥkhitaḥ
mbh_01.001.160 mūrcchitaḥ punar āśvastaḥ saṁjayaṁ vākyam abravīt
mbh_01.001.161 saṁjayaivaṁgate prāṇāṁs tyaktum icchāmi māciram
mbh_01.001.161 stokaṁ hy api na paśyāmi phalaṁ jīvitadhāraṇe
mbh_01.001.162 taṁ tathāvādinaṁ dīnaṁ vilapantaṁ mahīpatim
mbh_01.001.162 gāvalgaṇir idaṁ dhīmān mahārthaṁ vākyam abravīt
mbh_01.001.163 śrutavān asi vai rājño mahotsāhān mahābalān
mbh_01.001.163 dvaipāyanasya vadato nāradasya ca dhīmataḥ
mbh_01.001.164 mahatsu rājavaṁśeṣu guṇaiḥ samuditeṣu ca
mbh_01.001.164 jātān divyāstraviduṣaḥ śakrapratimatejasaḥ
mbh_01.001.165 dharmeṇa pr̥thivīṁ jitvā yajñair iṣṭvāptadakṣiṇaiḥ
mbh_01.001.165 asmim̐l loke yaśaḥ prāpya tataḥ kālavaśaṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.001.166 vainyaṁ mahārathaṁ vīraṁ sr̥ñjayaṁ jayatāṁ varam
mbh_01.001.166 suhotraṁ rantidevaṁ ca kakṣīvantaṁ tathauśijam
mbh_01.001.167 bāhlīkaṁ damanaṁ śaibyaṁ śaryātim ajitaṁ jitam
mbh_01.001.167 viśvāmitram amitraghnam ambarīṣaṁ mahābalam
mbh_01.001.168 maruttaṁ manum ikṣvākuṁ gayaṁ bharatam eva ca
mbh_01.001.168 rāmaṁ dāśarathiṁ caiva śaśabinduṁ bhagīratham
mbh_01.001.169 yayātiṁ śubhakarmāṇaṁ devair yo yājitaḥ svayam
mbh_01.001.169 caityayūpāṅkitā bhūmir yasyeyaṁ savanākarā
mbh_01.001.170 iti rājñāṁ caturviṁśan nāradena surarṣiṇā
mbh_01.001.170 putraśokābhitaptāya purā śaibyāya kīrtitāḥ
mbh_01.001.171 tebhyaś cānye gatāḥ pūrvaṁ rājāno balavattarāḥ
mbh_01.001.171 mahārathā mahātmānaḥ sarvaiḥ samuditā guṇaiḥ
mbh_01.001.172 pūruḥ kurur yaduḥ śūro viṣvagaśvo mahādhr̥tiḥ
mbh_01.001.172 anenā yuvanāśvaś ca kakutstho vikramī raghuḥ
mbh_01.001.173 vijitī vītihotraś ca bhavaḥ śveto br̥hadguruḥ
mbh_01.001.173 uśīnaraḥ śatarathaḥ kaṅko duliduho drumaḥ
mbh_01.001.174 dambhodbhavaḥ paro venaḥ sagaraḥ saṁkr̥tir nimiḥ
mbh_01.001.174 ajeyaḥ paraśuḥ puṇḍraḥ śaṁbhur devāvr̥dho ’naghaḥ
mbh_01.001.175 devāhvayaḥ supratimaḥ supratīko br̥hadrathaḥ
mbh_01.001.175 mahotsāho vinītātmā sukratur naiṣadho nalaḥ
mbh_01.001.176 satyavrataḥ śāntabhayaḥ sumitraḥ subalaḥ prabhuḥ
mbh_01.001.176 jānujaṅgho ’naraṇyo ’rkaḥ priyabhr̥tyaḥ śubhavrataḥ
mbh_01.001.177 balabandhur nirāmardaḥ ketuśr̥ṅgo br̥hadbalaḥ
mbh_01.001.177 dhr̥ṣṭaketur br̥hatketur dīptaketur nirāmayaḥ
mbh_01.001.178 avikṣit prabalo dhūrtaḥ kr̥tabandhur dr̥ḍheṣudhiḥ
mbh_01.001.178 mahāpurāṇaḥ saṁbhāvyaḥ pratyaṅgaḥ parahā śrutiḥ
mbh_01.001.179 ete cānye ca bahavaḥ śataśo ’tha sahasraśaḥ
mbh_01.001.179 śrūyante ’yutaśaś cānye saṁkhyātāś cāpi padmaśaḥ
mbh_01.001.180 hitvā suvipulān bhogān buddhimanto mahābalāḥ
mbh_01.001.180 rājāno nidhanaṁ prāptās tava putrair mahattamāḥ
mbh_01.001.181 yeṣāṁ divyāni karmāṇi vikramas tyāga eva ca
mbh_01.001.181 māhātmyam api cāstikyaṁ satyatā śaucam ārjavam
mbh_01.001.182 vidvadbhiḥ kathyate loke purāṇaiḥ kavisattamaiḥ
mbh_01.001.182 sarvarddhiguṇasaṁpannās te cāpi nidhanaṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.001.183 tava putrā durātmānaḥ prataptāś caiva manyunā
mbh_01.001.183 lubdhā durvr̥ttabhūyiṣṭhā na tāñ śocitum arhasi
mbh_01.001.184 śrutavān asi medhāvī buddhimān prājñasaṁmataḥ
mbh_01.001.184 yeṣāṁ śāstrānugā buddhir na te muhyanti bhārata
mbh_01.001.185 nigrahānugrahau cāpi viditau te narādhipa
mbh_01.001.185 nātyantam evānuvr̥ttiḥ śrūyate putrarakṣaṇe
mbh_01.001.186 bhavitavyaṁ tathā tac ca nātaḥ śocitum arhasi
mbh_01.001.186 daivaṁ prajñāviśeṣeṇa ko nivartitum arhati
mbh_01.001.187 vidhātr̥vihitaṁ mārgaṁ na kaś cid ativartate
mbh_01.001.187 kālamūlam idaṁ sarvaṁ bhāvābhāvau sukhāsukhe
mbh_01.001.188 kālaḥ pacati bhūtāni kālaḥ saṁharati prajāḥ
mbh_01.001.188 nirdahantaṁ prajāḥ kālaṁ kālaḥ śamayate punaḥ
mbh_01.001.189 kālo vikurute bhāvān sarvām̐l loke śubhāśubhān
mbh_01.001.189 kālaḥ saṁkṣipate sarvāḥ prajā visr̥jate punaḥ
mbh_01.001.189 kālaḥ sarveṣu bhūteṣu caraty avidhr̥taḥ samaḥ
mbh_01.001.190 atītānāgatā bhāvā ye ca vartanti sāṁpratam
mbh_01.001.190 tān kālanirmitān buddhvā na saṁjñāṁ hātum arhasi
mbh_01.001.191 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.001.191 atropaniṣadaṁ puṇyāṁ kr̥ṣṇadvaipāyano ’bravīt
mbh_01.001.191 bhāratādhyayanāt puṇyād api pādam adhīyataḥ
mbh_01.001.191 śraddadhānasya pūyante sarvapāpāny aśeṣataḥ
mbh_01.001.192 devarṣayo hy atra puṇyā brahmarājarṣayas tathā
mbh_01.001.192 kīrtyante śubhakarmāṇas tathā yakṣamahoragāḥ
mbh_01.001.193 bhagavān vāsudevaś ca kīrtyate ’tra sanātanaḥ
mbh_01.001.193 sa hi satyam r̥taṁ caiva pavitraṁ puṇyam eva ca
mbh_01.001.194 śāśvataṁ brahma paramaṁ dhruvaṁ jyotiḥ sanātanam
mbh_01.001.194 yasya divyāni karmāṇi kathayanti manīṣiṇaḥ
mbh_01.001.195 asat sat sadasac caiva yasmād devāt pravartate
mbh_01.001.195 saṁtatiś ca pravr̥ttiś ca janma mr̥tyuḥ punarbhavaḥ
mbh_01.001.196 adhyātmaṁ śrūyate yac ca pañcabhūtaguṇātmakam
mbh_01.001.196 avyaktādi paraṁ yac ca sa eva parigīyate
mbh_01.001.197 yat tad yativarā yuktā dhyānayogabalānvitāḥ
mbh_01.001.197 pratibimbam ivādarśe paśyanty ātmany avasthitam
mbh_01.001.198 śraddadhānaḥ sadodyuktaḥ satyadharmaparāyaṇaḥ
mbh_01.001.198 āsevann imam adhyāyaṁ naraḥ pāpāt pramucyate
mbh_01.001.199 anukramaṇim adhyāyaṁ bhāratasyemam āditaḥ
mbh_01.001.199 āstikaḥ satataṁ śr̥ṇvan na kr̥cchreṣv avasīdati
mbh_01.001.200 ubhe saṁdhye japan kiṁ cit sadyo mucyeta kilbiṣāt
mbh_01.001.200 anukramaṇyā yāvat syād ahnā rātryā ca saṁcitam
mbh_01.001.201 bhāratasya vapur hy etat satyaṁ cāmr̥tam eva ca
mbh_01.001.201 navanītaṁ yathā dadhno dvipadāṁ brāhmaṇo yathā
mbh_01.001.202 hradānām udadhiḥ śreṣṭho gaur variṣṭhā catuṣpadām
mbh_01.001.202 yathaitāni variṣṭhāni tathā bhāratam ucyate
mbh_01.001.203 yaś cainaṁ śrāvayec chrāddhe brāhmaṇān pādam antataḥ
mbh_01.001.203 akṣayyam annapānaṁ tat pitr̥̄ṁs tasyopatiṣṭhati
mbh_01.001.204 itihāsapurāṇābhyāṁ vedaṁ samupabr̥ṁhayet
mbh_01.001.204 bibhety alpaśrutād vedo mām ayaṁ pratariṣyati
mbh_01.001.205 kārṣṇaṁ vedam imaṁ vidvāñ śrāvayitvārtham aśnute
mbh_01.001.205 bhrūṇahatyākr̥taṁ cāpi pāpaṁ jahyān na saṁśayaḥ
mbh_01.001.206 ya imaṁ śucir adhyāyaṁ paṭhet parvaṇi parvaṇi
mbh_01.001.206 adhītaṁ bhārataṁ tena kr̥tsnaṁ syād iti me matiḥ
mbh_01.001.207 yaś cemaṁ śr̥ṇuyān nityam ārṣaṁ śraddhāsamanvitaḥ
mbh_01.001.207 sa dīrgham āyuḥ kīrtiṁ ca svargatiṁ cāpnuyān naraḥ
mbh_01.001.208 catvāra ekato vedā bhārataṁ caikam ekataḥ
mbh_01.001.208 samāgataiḥ surarṣibhis tulām āropitaṁ purā
mbh_01.001.208 mahattve ca gurutve ca dhriyamāṇaṁ tato ’dhikam
mbh_01.001.209 mahattvād bhāravattvāc ca mahābhāratam ucyate
mbh_01.001.209 niruktam asya yo veda sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
mbh_01.001.210 tapo na kalko ’dhyayanaṁ na kalkaḥ; svābhāviko vedavidhir na kalkaḥ
mbh_01.001.210 prasahya vittāharaṇaṁ na kalkas; tāny eva bhāvopahatāni kalkaḥ

mbh_01.002.001 r̥ṣaya ūcuḥ
mbh_01.002.001 samantapañcakam iti yad uktaṁ sūtanandana
mbh_01.002.001 etat sarvaṁ yathānyāyaṁ śrotum icchāmahe vayam
mbh_01.002.002 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.002.002 śuśrūṣā yadi vo viprā bruvataś ca kathāḥ śubhāḥ
mbh_01.002.002 samantapañcakākhyaṁ ca śrotum arhatha sattamāḥ
mbh_01.002.003 tretādvāparayoḥ saṁdhau rāmaḥ śastrabhr̥tāṁ varaḥ
mbh_01.002.003 asakr̥t pārthivaṁ kṣatraṁ jaghānāmarṣacoditaḥ
mbh_01.002.004 sa sarvaṁ kṣatram utsādya svavīryeṇānaladyutiḥ
mbh_01.002.004 samantapañcake pañca cakāra rudhirahradān
mbh_01.002.005 sa teṣu rudhirāmbhassu hradeṣu krodhamūrcchitaḥ
mbh_01.002.005 pitr̥̄n saṁtarpayām āsa rudhireṇeti naḥ śrutam
mbh_01.002.006 atharcīkādayo ’bhyetya pitaro brāhmaṇarṣabham
mbh_01.002.006 taṁ kṣamasveti siṣidhus tataḥ sa virarāma ha
mbh_01.002.007 teṣāṁ samīpe yo deśo hradānāṁ rudhirāmbhasām
mbh_01.002.007 samantapañcakam iti puṇyaṁ tatparikīrtitam
mbh_01.002.008 yena liṅgena yo deśo yuktaḥ samupalakṣyate
mbh_01.002.008 tenaiva nāmnā taṁ deśaṁ vācyam āhur manīṣiṇaḥ
mbh_01.002.009 antare caiva saṁprāpte kalidvāparayor abhūt
mbh_01.002.009 samantapañcake yuddhaṁ kurupāṇḍavasenayoḥ
mbh_01.002.010 tasmin paramadharmiṣṭhe deśe bhūdoṣavarjite
mbh_01.002.010 aṣṭādaśa samājagmur akṣauhiṇyo yuyutsayā
mbh_01.002.011 evaṁ nāmābhinirvr̥ttaṁ tasya deśasya vai dvijāḥ
mbh_01.002.011 puṇyaś ca ramaṇīyaś ca sa deśo vaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
mbh_01.002.012 tad etat kathitaṁ sarvaṁ mayā vo munisattamāḥ
mbh_01.002.012 yathā deśaḥ sa vikhyātas triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ
mbh_01.002.013 r̥ṣaya ūcuḥ
mbh_01.002.013 akṣauhiṇya iti proktaṁ yat tvayā sūtanandana
mbh_01.002.013 etad icchāmahe śrotuṁ sarvam eva yathātatham
mbh_01.002.014 akṣauhiṇyāḥ parīmāṇaṁ rathāśvanaradantinām
mbh_01.002.014 yathāvac caiva no brūhi sarvaṁ hi viditaṁ tava
mbh_01.002.015 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.002.015 eko ratho gajaś caiko narāḥ pañca padātayaḥ
mbh_01.002.015 trayaś ca turagās tajjñaiḥ pattir ity abhidhīyate
mbh_01.002.016 pattiṁ tu triguṇām etām āhuḥ senāmukhaṁ budhāḥ
mbh_01.002.016 trīṇi senāmukhāny eko gulma ity abhidhīyate
mbh_01.002.017 trayo gulmā gaṇo nāma vāhinī tu gaṇās trayaḥ
mbh_01.002.017 smr̥tās tisras tu vāhinyaḥ pr̥taneti vicakṣaṇaiḥ
mbh_01.002.018 camūs tu pr̥tanās tisras tisraś camvas tv anīkinī
mbh_01.002.018 anīkinīṁ daśaguṇāṁ prāhur akṣauhiṇīṁ budhāḥ
mbh_01.002.019 akṣauhiṇyāḥ prasaṁkhyānaṁ rathānāṁ dvijasattamāḥ
mbh_01.002.019 saṁkhyāgaṇitatattvajñaiḥ sahasrāṇy ekaviṁśatiḥ
mbh_01.002.020 śatāny upari caivāṣṭau tathā bhūyaś ca saptatiḥ
mbh_01.002.020 gajānāṁ tu parīmāṇam etad evātra nirdiśet
mbh_01.002.021 jñeyaṁ śatasahasraṁ tu sahasrāṇi tathā nava
mbh_01.002.021 narāṇām api pañcāśac chatāni trīṇi cānaghāḥ
mbh_01.002.022 pañcaṣaṣṭisahasrāṇi tathāśvānāṁ śatāni ca
mbh_01.002.022 daśottarāṇi ṣaṭ prāhur yathāvad iha saṁkhyayā
mbh_01.002.023 etām akṣauhiṇīṁ prāhuḥ saṁkhyātattvavido janāḥ
mbh_01.002.023 yāṁ vaḥ kathitavān asmi vistareṇa dvijottamāḥ
mbh_01.002.024 etayā saṁkhyayā hy āsan kurupāṇḍavasenayoḥ
mbh_01.002.024 akṣauhiṇyo dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ piṇḍenāṣṭādaśaiva tāḥ
mbh_01.002.025 sametās tatra vai deśe tatraiva nidhanaṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.002.025 kauravān kāraṇaṁ kr̥tvā kālenādbhutakarmaṇā
mbh_01.002.026 ahāni yuyudhe bhīṣmo daśaiva paramāstravit
mbh_01.002.026 ahāni pañca droṇas tu rarakṣa kuruvāhinīm
mbh_01.002.027 ahanī yuyudhe dve tu karṇaḥ parabalārdanaḥ
mbh_01.002.027 śalyo ’rdhadivasaṁ tv āsīd gadāyuddham ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.028 tasyaiva tu dinasyānte hārdikyadrauṇigautamāḥ
mbh_01.002.028 prasuptaṁ niśi viśvastaṁ jaghnur yaudhiṣṭhiraṁ balam
mbh_01.002.029 yat tu śaunakasatre te bhāratākhyānavistaram
mbh_01.002.029 ākhyāsye tatra paulomam ākhyānaṁ cāditaḥ param
mbh_01.002.030 vicitrārthapadākhyānam anekasamayānvitam
mbh_01.002.030 abhipannaṁ naraiḥ prājñair vairāgyam iva mokṣibhiḥ
mbh_01.002.031 ātmeva veditavyeṣu priyeṣv iva ca jīvitam
mbh_01.002.031 itihāsaḥ pradhānārthaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ sarvāgameṣv ayam
mbh_01.002.032 itihāsottame hy asminn arpitā buddhir uttamā
mbh_01.002.032 svaravyañjanayoḥ kr̥tsnā lokavedāśrayeva vāk
mbh_01.002.033 asya prajñābhipannasya vicitrapadaparvaṇaḥ
mbh_01.002.033 bhāratasyetihāsasya śrūyatāṁ parvasaṁgrahaḥ
mbh_01.002.034 parvānukramaṇī pūrvaṁ dvitīyaṁ parvasaṁgrahaḥ
mbh_01.002.034 pauṣyaṁ paulomam āstīkam ādivaṁśāvatāraṇam
mbh_01.002.035 tataḥ saṁbhavaparvoktam adbhutaṁ devanirmitam
mbh_01.002.035 dāho jatugr̥hasyātra haiḍimbaṁ parva cocyate
mbh_01.002.036 tato bakavadhaḥ parva parva caitrarathaṁ tataḥ
mbh_01.002.036 tataḥ svayaṁvaraṁ devyāḥ pāñcālyāḥ parva cocyate
mbh_01.002.037 kṣatradharmeṇa nirjitya tato vaivāhikaṁ smr̥tam
mbh_01.002.037 vidurāgamanaṁ parva rājyalambhas tathaiva ca
mbh_01.002.038 arjunasya vane vāsaḥ subhadrāharaṇaṁ tataḥ
mbh_01.002.038 subhadrāharaṇād ūrdhvaṁ jñeyaṁ haraṇahārikam
mbh_01.002.039 tataḥ khāṇḍavadāhākhyaṁ tatraiva mayadarśanam
mbh_01.002.039 sabhāparva tataḥ proktaṁ mantraparva tataḥ param
mbh_01.002.040 jarāsaṁdhavadhaḥ parva parva digvijayas tathā
mbh_01.002.040 parva digvijayād ūrdhvaṁ rājasūyikam ucyate
mbh_01.002.041 tataś cārghābhiharaṇaṁ śiśupālavadhas tataḥ
mbh_01.002.041 dyūtaparva tataḥ proktam anudyūtam ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.042 tata āraṇyakaṁ parva kirmīravadha eva ca
mbh_01.002.042 īśvarārjunayor yuddhaṁ parva kairātasaṁjñitam
mbh_01.002.043 indralokābhigamanaṁ parva jñeyam ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.043 tīrthayātrā tataḥ parva kururājasya dhīmataḥ
mbh_01.002.044 jaṭāsuravadhaḥ parva yakṣayuddham ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.044 tathaivājagaraṁ parva vijñeyaṁ tadanantaram
mbh_01.002.045 mārkaṇḍeyasamasyā ca parvoktaṁ tadanantaram
mbh_01.002.045 saṁvādaś ca tataḥ parva draupadīsatyabhāmayoḥ
mbh_01.002.046 ghoṣayātrā tataḥ parva mr̥gasvapnabhayaṁ tataḥ
mbh_01.002.046 vrīhidrauṇikam ākhyānaṁ tato ’nantaram ucyate
mbh_01.002.047 draupadīharaṇaṁ parva saindhavena vanāt tataḥ
mbh_01.002.047 kuṇḍalāharaṇaṁ parva tataḥ param ihocyate
mbh_01.002.048 āraṇeyaṁ tataḥ parva vairāṭaṁ tadanantaram
mbh_01.002.048 kīcakānāṁ vadhaḥ parva parva gograhaṇaṁ tataḥ
mbh_01.002.049 abhimanyunā ca vairāṭyāḥ parva vaivāhikaṁ smr̥tam
mbh_01.002.049 udyogaparva vijñeyam ata ūrdhvaṁ mahādbhutam
mbh_01.002.050 tataḥ saṁjayayānākhyaṁ parva jñeyam ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.050 prajāgaraṁ tataḥ parva dhr̥tarāṣṭrasya cintayā
mbh_01.002.051 parva sānatsujātaṁ ca guhyam adhyātmadarśanam
mbh_01.002.051 yānasaṁdhis tataḥ parva bhagavad yānam eva ca
mbh_01.002.052 jñeyaṁ vivādaparvātra karṇasyāpi mahātmanaḥ
mbh_01.002.052 niryāṇaṁ parva ca tataḥ kurupāṇḍavasenayoḥ
mbh_01.002.053 rathātirathasaṁkhyā ca parvoktaṁ tadanantaram
mbh_01.002.053 ulūkadūtāgamanaṁ parvāmarṣavivardhanam
mbh_01.002.054 ambopākhyānam api ca parva jñeyam ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.054 bhīṣmābhiṣecanaṁ parva jñeyam adbhutakāraṇam
mbh_01.002.055 jambūkhaṇḍavinirmāṇaṁ parvoktaṁ tadanantaram
mbh_01.002.055 bhūmiparva tato jñeyaṁ dvīpavistarakīrtanam
mbh_01.002.056 parvoktaṁ bhagavadgītā parva bhīṣmavadhas tataḥ
mbh_01.002.056 droṇābhiṣekaḥ parvoktaṁ saṁśaptakavadhas tataḥ
mbh_01.002.057 abhimanyuvadhaḥ parva pratijñāparva cocyate
mbh_01.002.057 jayadrathavadhaḥ parva ghaṭotkacavadhas tataḥ
mbh_01.002.058 tato droṇavadhaḥ parva vijñeyaṁ lomaharṣaṇam
mbh_01.002.058 mokṣo nārāyaṇāstrasya parvānantaram ucyate
mbh_01.002.059 karṇaparva tato jñeyaṁ śalyaparva tataḥ param
mbh_01.002.059 hradapraveśanaṁ parva gadāyuddham ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.060 sārasvataṁ tataḥ parva tīrthavaṁśaguṇānvitam
mbh_01.002.060 ata ūrdhvaṁ tu bībhatsaṁ parva sauptikam ucyate
mbh_01.002.061 aiṣīkaṁ parva nirdiṣṭam ata ūrdhvaṁ sudāruṇam
mbh_01.002.061 jalapradānikaṁ parva strīparva ca tataḥ param
mbh_01.002.062 śrāddhaparva tato jñeyaṁ kurūṇām aurdhvadehikam
mbh_01.002.062 ābhiṣecanikaṁ parva dharmarājasya dhīmataḥ
mbh_01.002.063 cārvākanigrahaḥ parva rakṣaso brahmarūpiṇaḥ
mbh_01.002.063 pravibhāgo gr̥hāṇāṁ ca parvoktaṁ tadanantaram
mbh_01.002.064 śāntiparva tato yatra rājadharmānukīrtanam
mbh_01.002.064 āpaddharmaś ca parvoktaṁ mokṣadharmas tataḥ param
mbh_01.002.065 tataḥ parva parijñeyam ānuśāsanikaṁ param
mbh_01.002.065 svargārohaṇikaṁ parva tato bhīṣmasya dhīmataḥ
mbh_01.002.066 tato ’śvamedhikaṁ parva sarvapāpapraṇāśanam
mbh_01.002.066 anugītā tataḥ parva jñeyam adhyātmavācakam
mbh_01.002.067 parva cāśramavāsākhyaṁ putradarśanam eva ca
mbh_01.002.067 nāradāgamanaṁ parva tataḥ param ihocyate
mbh_01.002.068 mausalaṁ parva ca tato ghoraṁ samanuvarṇyate
mbh_01.002.068 mahāprasthānikaṁ parva svargārohaṇikaṁ tataḥ
mbh_01.002.069 harivaṁśas tataḥ parva purāṇaṁ khilasaṁjñitam
mbh_01.002.069 bhaviṣyatparva cāpy uktaṁ khileṣv evādbhutaṁ mahat
mbh_01.002.070 etat parvaśataṁ pūrṇaṁ vyāsenoktaṁ mahātmanā
mbh_01.002.070 yathāvat sūtaputreṇa lomaharṣaṇinā punaḥ

mbh_01.002.073 kṣīrodamathanaṁ caiva janmocchaiḥśravasas tathā

mbh_01.002.077 anyeṣāṁ caiva bhūtānāṁ vividhānāṁ samudbhavaḥ

mbh_01.002.078 śaṁtanor veśmani punas teṣāṁ cārohaṇaṁ divi

mbh_01.002.081 dharmasya nr̥ṣu saṁbhūtir aṇīmāṇḍavyaśāpajā
mbh_01.002.082 kr̥ṣṇadvaipāyanāc caiva prasūtir varadānajā

mbh_01.002.087 tāpatyam atha vāsiṣṭham aurvaṁ cākhyānam uttamam
mbh_01.002.087 pañcendrāṇām upākhyānam atraivādbhutam ucyate
mbh_01.002.088 pañcānām ekapatnītve vimarśo drupadasya ca

mbh_01.002.089 vidurasya ca saṁprāptir darśanaṁ keśavasya ca

mbh_01.002.090 nāradasyājñayā caiva draupadyāḥ samayakriyā
mbh_01.002.090 sundopasundayos tatra upākhyānaṁ prakīrtitam
mbh_01.002.091 pārthasya vanavāsaś ca ulūpyā pathi saṁgamaḥ
mbh_01.002.091 puṇyatīrthānusaṁyānaṁ babhruvāhanajanma ca

mbh_01.002.092 vāsudevasyānumate prāptā caiva kirīṭinā

mbh_01.002.097 sabhākriyā pāṇḍavānāṁ kiṁkarāṇāṁ ca darśanam
mbh_01.002.098 lokapālasabhākhyānaṁ nāradād devadarśanāt
mbh_01.002.098 rājasūyasya cārambho jarāsaṁdhavadhas tathā
mbh_01.002.099 girivraje niruddhānāṁ rājñāṁ kr̥ṣṇena mokṣaṇam
mbh_01.002.099 rājasūye ’rghasaṁvāde śiśupālavadhas tathā
mbh_01.002.100 yajñe vibhūtiṁ tāṁ dr̥ṣṭvā duḥkhāmarṣānvitasya ca
mbh_01.002.100 duryodhanasyāvahāso bhīmena ca sabhātale
mbh_01.002.101 yatrāsya manyur udbhūto yena dyūtam akārayat
mbh_01.002.101 yatra dharmasutaṁ dyūte śakuniḥ kitavo ’jayat
mbh_01.002.102 yatra dyūtārṇave magnān draupadī naur ivārṇavāt
mbh_01.002.102 tārayām āsa tāṁs tīrṇāñ jñātvā duryodhano nr̥paḥ
mbh_01.002.102 punar eva tato dyūte samāhvayata pāṇḍavān
mbh_01.002.103 etat sarvaṁ sabhāparva samākhyātaṁ mahātmanā
mbh_01.002.103 adhyāyāḥ saptatir jñeyās tathā dvau cātra saṁkhyayā
mbh_01.002.104 ślokānāṁ dve sahasre tu pañca ślokaśatāni ca
mbh_01.002.104 ślokāś caikādaśa jñeyāḥ parvaṇy asmin prakīrtitāḥ
mbh_01.002.105 ataḥ paraṁ tr̥tīyaṁ tu jñeyam āraṇyakaṁ mahat
mbh_01.002.105 paurānugamanaṁ caiva dharmaputrasya dhīmataḥ
mbh_01.002.106 vr̥ṣṇīnām āgamo yatra pāñcālānāṁ ca sarvaśaḥ
mbh_01.002.106 yatra saubhavadhākhyānaṁ kirmīravadha eva ca
mbh_01.002.106 astrahetor vivāsaś ca pārthasyāmitatejasaḥ
mbh_01.002.107 mahādevena yuddhaṁ ca kirātavapuṣā saha
mbh_01.002.107 darśanaṁ lokapālānāṁ svargārohaṇam eva ca
mbh_01.002.108 darśanaṁ br̥hadaśvasya maharṣer bhāvitātmanaḥ
mbh_01.002.108 yudhiṣṭhirasya cārtasya vyasane paridevanam
mbh_01.002.109 nalopākhyānam atraiva dharmiṣṭhaṁ karuṇodayam
mbh_01.002.109 damayantyāḥ sthitir yatra nalasya vyasanāgame
mbh_01.002.110 vanavāsagatānāṁ ca pāṇḍavānāṁ mahātmanām
mbh_01.002.110 svarge pravr̥ttir ākhyātā lomaśenārjunasya vai
mbh_01.002.111 tīrthayātrā tathaivātra pāṇḍavānāṁ mahātmanām
mbh_01.002.111 jaṭāsurasya tatraiva vadhaḥ samupavarṇyate
mbh_01.002.112 niyukto bhīmasenaś ca draupadyā gandhamādane
mbh_01.002.112 yatra mandārapuṣpārthaṁ nalinīṁ tām adharṣayat
mbh_01.002.113 yatrāsya sumahad yuddham abhavat saha rākṣasaiḥ
mbh_01.002.113 yakṣaiś cāpi mahāvīryair maṇimatpramukhais tathā
mbh_01.002.114 āgastyam api cākhyānaṁ yatra vātāpibhakṣaṇam
mbh_01.002.114 lopāmudrābhigamanam apatyārtham r̥ṣer api
mbh_01.002.115 tataḥ śyenakapotīyam upākhyānam anantaram
mbh_01.002.115 indro ’gnir yatra dharmaś ca ajijñāsañ śibiṁ nr̥pam
mbh_01.002.116 r̥śyaśr̥ṅgasya caritaṁ kaumārabrahmacāriṇaḥ
mbh_01.002.116 jāmadagnyasya rāmasya caritaṁ bhūritejasaḥ
mbh_01.002.117 kārtavīryavadho yatra haihayānāṁ ca varṇyate
mbh_01.002.117 saukanyam api cākhyānaṁ cyavano yatra bhārgavaḥ
mbh_01.002.118 śaryātiyajñe nāsatyau kr̥tavān somapīthinau
mbh_01.002.118 tābhyāṁ ca yatra sa munir yauvanaṁ pratipāditaḥ
mbh_01.002.119 jantūpākhyānam atraiva yatra putreṇa somakaḥ
mbh_01.002.119 putrārtham ayajad rājā lebhe putraśataṁ ca saḥ
mbh_01.002.120 aṣṭāvakrīyam atraiva vivāde yatra bandinam
mbh_01.002.120 vijitya sāgaraṁ prāptaṁ pitaraṁ labdhavān r̥ṣiḥ
mbh_01.002.121 avāpya divyāny astrāṇi gurvarthe savyasācinā
mbh_01.002.121 nivātakavacair yuddhaṁ hiraṇyapuravāsibhiḥ
mbh_01.002.122 samāgamaś ca pārthasya bhrātr̥bhir gandhamādane
mbh_01.002.122 ghoṣayātrā ca gandharvair yatra yuddhaṁ kirīṭinaḥ
mbh_01.002.123 punarāgamanaṁ caiva teṣāṁ dvaitavanaṁ saraḥ
mbh_01.002.123 jayadrathenāpahāro draupadyāś cāśramāntarāt
mbh_01.002.124 yatrainam anvayād bhīmo vāyuvegasamo jave
mbh_01.002.124 mārkaṇḍeyasamasyāyām upākhyānāni bhāgaśaḥ
mbh_01.002.125 saṁdarśanaṁ ca kr̥ṣṇasya saṁvādaś caiva satyayā
mbh_01.002.125 vrīhidrauṇikam ākhyānam aindradyumnaṁ tathaiva ca
mbh_01.002.126 sāvitryauddālakīyaṁ ca vainyopākhyānam eva ca
mbh_01.002.126 rāmāyaṇam upākhyānam atraiva bahuvistaram
mbh_01.002.127 karṇasya parimoṣo ’tra kuṇḍalābhyāṁ puraṁdarāt
mbh_01.002.127 āraṇeyam upākhyānaṁ yatra dharmo ’nvaśāt sutam
mbh_01.002.127 jagmur labdhavarā yatra pāṇḍavāḥ paścimāṁ diśam
mbh_01.002.128 etad āraṇyakaṁ parva tr̥tīyaṁ parikīrtitam
mbh_01.002.128 atrādhyāyaśate dve tu saṁkhyāte paramarṣiṇā
mbh_01.002.128 ekonasaptatiś caiva tathādhyāyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
mbh_01.002.129 ekādaśa sahasrāṇi ślokānāṁ ṣaṭśatāni ca
mbh_01.002.129 catuḥṣaṣṭis tathā ślokāḥ parvaitat parikīrtitam
mbh_01.002.130 ataḥ paraṁ nibodhedaṁ vairāṭaṁ parvavistaram
mbh_01.002.130 virāṭanagaraṁ gatvā śmaśāne vipulāṁ śamīm
mbh_01.002.130 dr̥ṣṭvā saṁnidadhus tatra pāṇḍavā āyudhāny uta
mbh_01.002.131 yatra praviśya nagaraṁ chadmabhir nyavasanta te
mbh_01.002.131 durātmano vadho yatra kīcakasya vr̥kodarāt
mbh_01.002.132 gograhe yatra pārthena nirjitāḥ kuravo yudhi
mbh_01.002.132 godhanaṁ ca virāṭasya mokṣitaṁ yatra pāṇḍavaiḥ
mbh_01.002.133 virāṭenottarā dattā snuṣā yatra kirīṭinaḥ
mbh_01.002.133 abhimanyuṁ samuddiśya saubhadram arighātinam
mbh_01.002.134 caturtham etad vipulaṁ vairāṭaṁ parva varṇitam
mbh_01.002.134 atrāpi parisaṁkhyātam adhyāyānāṁ mahātmanā
mbh_01.002.135 saptaṣaṣṭir atho pūrṇā ślokāgram api me śr̥ṇu
mbh_01.002.135 ślokānāṁ dve sahasre tu ślokāḥ pañcāśad eva tu
mbh_01.002.135 parvaṇy asmin samākhyātāḥ saṁkhyayā paramarṣiṇā
mbh_01.002.136 udyogaparva vijñeyaṁ pañcamaṁ śr̥ṇv ataḥ param
mbh_01.002.136 upaplavye niviṣṭeṣu pāṇḍaveṣu jigīṣayā
mbh_01.002.136 duryodhano ’rjunaś caiva vāsudevam upasthitau
mbh_01.002.137 sāhāyyam asmin samare bhavān nau kartum arhati
mbh_01.002.137 ity ukte vacane kr̥ṣṇo yatrovāca mahāmatiḥ
mbh_01.002.138 ayudhyamānam ātmānaṁ mantriṇaṁ puruṣarṣabhau
mbh_01.002.138 akṣauhiṇīṁ vā sainyasya kasya vā kiṁ dadāmy aham
mbh_01.002.139 vavre duryodhanaḥ sainyaṁ mandātmā yatra durmatiḥ
mbh_01.002.139 ayudhyamānaṁ sacivaṁ vavre kr̥ṣṇaṁ dhanaṁjayaḥ
mbh_01.002.140 saṁjayaṁ preṣayām āsa śamārthaṁ pāṇḍavān prati
mbh_01.002.140 yatra dūtaṁ mahārājo dhr̥tarāṣṭraḥ pratāpavān
mbh_01.002.141 śrutvā ca pāṇḍavān yatra vāsudevapurogamān
mbh_01.002.141 prajāgaraḥ saṁprajajñe dhr̥tarāṣṭrasya cintayā
mbh_01.002.142 viduro yatra vākyāni vicitrāṇi hitāni ca
mbh_01.002.142 śrāvayām āsa rājānaṁ dhr̥tarāṣṭraṁ manīṣiṇam
mbh_01.002.143 tathā sanatsujātena yatrādhyātmam anuttamam
mbh_01.002.143 manastāpānvito rājā śrāvitaḥ śokalālasaḥ
mbh_01.002.144 prabhāte rājasamitau saṁjayo yatra cābhibhoḥ
mbh_01.002.144 aikātmyaṁ vāsudevasya proktavān arjunasya ca
mbh_01.002.145 yatra kr̥ṣṇo dayāpannaḥ saṁdhim icchan mahāyaśāḥ
mbh_01.002.145 svayam āgāc chamaṁ kartuṁ nagaraṁ nāgasāhvayam
mbh_01.002.146 pratyākhyānaṁ ca kr̥ṣṇasya rājñā duryodhanena vai
mbh_01.002.146 śamārthaṁ yācamānasya pakṣayor ubhayor hitam
mbh_01.002.147 karṇaduryodhanādīnāṁ duṣṭaṁ vijñāya mantritam
mbh_01.002.147 yogeśvaratvaṁ kr̥ṣṇena yatra rājasu darśitam
mbh_01.002.148 ratham āropya kr̥ṣṇena yatra karṇo ’numantritaḥ
mbh_01.002.148 upāyapūrvaṁ śauṇḍīryāt pratyākhyātaś ca tena saḥ
mbh_01.002.149 tataś cāpy abhiniryātrā rathāśvanaradantinām
mbh_01.002.149 nagarād dhāstinapurād balasaṁkhyānam eva ca
mbh_01.002.150 yatra rājñā ulūkasya preṣaṇaṁ pāṇḍavān prati
mbh_01.002.150 śvobhāvini mahāyuddhe dūtyena krūravādinā
mbh_01.002.150 rathātirathasaṁkhyānam ambopākhyānam eva ca
mbh_01.002.151 etat subahuvr̥ttāntaṁ pañcamaṁ parva bhārate
mbh_01.002.151 udyogaparva nirdiṣṭaṁ saṁdhivigrahasaṁśritam
mbh_01.002.152 adhyāyāḥ saṁkhyayā tv atra ṣaḍaśītiśataṁ smr̥tam
mbh_01.002.152 ślokānāṁ ṣaṭ sahasrāṇi tāvanty eva śatāni ca
mbh_01.002.153 ślokāś ca navatiḥ proktās tathaivāṣṭau mahātmanā
mbh_01.002.153 vyāsenodāramatinā parvaṇy asmiṁs tapodhanāḥ
mbh_01.002.154 ata ūrdhvaṁ vicitrārthaṁ bhīṣmaparva pracakṣate
mbh_01.002.154 jambūkhaṇḍavinirmāṇaṁ yatroktaṁ saṁjayena ha
mbh_01.002.155 yatra yuddham abhūd ghoraṁ daśāhāny atidāruṇam
mbh_01.002.155 yatra yaudhiṣṭhiraṁ sainyaṁ viṣādam agamat param
mbh_01.002.156 kaśmalaṁ yatra pārthasya vāsudevo mahāmatiḥ
mbh_01.002.156 mohajaṁ nāśayām āsa hetubhir mokṣadarśanaiḥ
mbh_01.002.157 śikhaṇḍinaṁ puraskr̥tya yatra pārtho mahādhanuḥ
mbh_01.002.157 vinighnan niśitair bāṇai rathād bhīṣmam apātayat
mbh_01.002.158 ṣaṣṭham etan mahāparva bhārate parikīrtitam
mbh_01.002.158 adhyāyānāṁ śataṁ proktaṁ saptadaśa tathāpare
mbh_01.002.159 pañca ślokasahasrāṇi saṁkhyayāṣṭau śatāni ca
mbh_01.002.159 ślokāś ca caturāśītiḥ parvaṇy asmin prakīrtitāḥ
mbh_01.002.159 vyāsena vedaviduṣā saṁkhyātā bhīṣmaparvaṇi
mbh_01.002.160 droṇaparva tataś citraṁ bahuvr̥ttāntam ucyate
mbh_01.002.160 yatra saṁśaptakāḥ pārtham apaninyū raṇājirāt
mbh_01.002.161 bhagadatto mahārājo yatra śakrasamo yudhi
mbh_01.002.161 supratīkena nāgena saha śastaḥ kirīṭinā
mbh_01.002.162 yatrābhimanyuṁ bahavo jaghnur lokamahārathāḥ
mbh_01.002.162 jayadrathamukhā bālaṁ śūram aprāptayauvanam
mbh_01.002.163 hate ’bhimanyau kruddhena yatra pārthena saṁyuge
mbh_01.002.163 akṣauhiṇīḥ sapta hatvā hato rājā jayadrathaḥ
mbh_01.002.163 saṁśaptakāvaśeṣaṁ ca kr̥taṁ niḥśeṣam āhave
mbh_01.002.164 alambusaḥ śrutāyuś ca jalasaṁdhaś ca vīryavān
mbh_01.002.164 saumadattir virāṭaś ca drupadaś ca mahārathaḥ
mbh_01.002.164 ghaṭotkacādayaś cānye nihatā droṇaparvaṇi
mbh_01.002.165 aśvatthāmāpi cātraiva droṇe yudhi nipātite
mbh_01.002.165 astraṁ prāduścakārograṁ nārāyaṇam amarṣitaḥ
mbh_01.002.166 saptamaṁ bhārate parva mahad etad udāhr̥tam
mbh_01.002.166 atra te pr̥thivīpālāḥ prāyaśo nidhanaṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.002.166 droṇaparvaṇi ye śūrā nirdiṣṭāḥ puruṣarṣabhāḥ
mbh_01.002.167 adhyāyānāṁ śataṁ proktam adhyāyāḥ saptatis tathā
mbh_01.002.167 aṣṭau ślokasahasrāṇi tathā nava śatāni ca
mbh_01.002.168 ślokā nava tathaivātra saṁkhyātās tattvadarśinā
mbh_01.002.168 pārāśaryeṇa muninā saṁcintya droṇaparvaṇi
mbh_01.002.169 ataḥ paraṁ karṇaparva procyate paramādbhutam
mbh_01.002.169 sārathye viniyogaś ca madrarājasya dhīmataḥ
mbh_01.002.169 ākhyātaṁ yatra paurāṇaṁ tripurasya nipātanam
mbh_01.002.170 prayāṇe paruṣaś cātra saṁvādaḥ karṇaśalyayoḥ
mbh_01.002.170 haṁsakākīyam ākhyānam atraivākṣepasaṁhitam
mbh_01.002.171 anyonyaṁ prati ca krodho yudhiṣṭhirakirīṭinoḥ
mbh_01.002.171 dvairathe yatra pārthena hataḥ karṇo mahārathaḥ
mbh_01.002.172 aṣṭamaṁ parva nirdiṣṭam etad bhāratacintakaiḥ
mbh_01.002.172 ekonasaptatiḥ proktā adhyāyāḥ karṇaparvaṇi
mbh_01.002.172 catvāry eva sahasrāṇi nava ślokaśatāni ca
mbh_01.002.173 ataḥ paraṁ vicitrārthaṁ śalyaparva prakīrtitam
mbh_01.002.173 hatapravīre sainye tu netā madreśvaro ’bhavat
mbh_01.002.174 vr̥ttāni rathayuddhāni kīrtyante yatra bhāgaśaḥ
mbh_01.002.174 vināśaḥ kurumukhyānāṁ śalyaparvaṇi kīrtyate
mbh_01.002.175 śalyasya nidhanaṁ cātra dharmarājān mahārathāt
mbh_01.002.175 gadāyuddhaṁ tu tumulam atraiva parikīrtitam
mbh_01.002.175 sarasvatyāś ca tīrthānāṁ puṇyatā parikīrtitā
mbh_01.002.176 navamaṁ parva nirdiṣṭam etad adbhutam arthavat
mbh_01.002.176 ekonaṣaṣṭir adhyāyās tatra saṁkhyāviśāradaiḥ
mbh_01.002.177 saṁkhyātā bahuvr̥ttāntāḥ ślokāgraṁ cātra śasyate
mbh_01.002.177 trīṇi ślokasahasrāṇi dve śate viṁśatis tathā
mbh_01.002.177 muninā saṁpraṇītāni kauravāṇāṁ yaśobhr̥tām
mbh_01.002.178 ataḥ paraṁ pravakṣyāmi sauptikaṁ parva dāruṇam
mbh_01.002.178 bhagnoruṁ yatra rājānaṁ duryodhanam amarṣaṇam
mbh_01.002.179 vyapayāteṣu pārtheṣu trayas te ’bhyāyayū rathāḥ
mbh_01.002.179 kr̥tavarmā kr̥po drauṇiḥ sāyāhne rudhirokṣitāḥ
mbh_01.002.180 pratijajñe dr̥ḍhakrodho drauṇir yatra mahārathaḥ
mbh_01.002.180 ahatvā sarvapāñcālān dhr̥ṣṭadyumnapurogamān
mbh_01.002.180 pāṇḍavāṁś ca sahāmātyān na vimokṣyāmi daṁśanam
mbh_01.002.181 prasuptān niśi viśvastān yatra te puruṣarṣabhāḥ
mbh_01.002.181 pāñcālān saparīvārāñ jaghnur drauṇipurogamāḥ
mbh_01.002.182 yatrāmucyanta pārthās te pañca kr̥ṣṇabalāśrayāt
mbh_01.002.182 sātyakiś ca maheṣvāsaḥ śeṣāś ca nidhanaṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.002.183 draupadī putraśokārtā pitr̥bhrātr̥vadhārditā
mbh_01.002.183 kr̥tānaśanasaṁkalpā yatra bhartr̥̄n upāviśat
mbh_01.002.184 draupadīvacanād yatra bhīmo bhīmaparākramaḥ
mbh_01.002.184 anvadhāvata saṁkruddho bhāradvājaṁ guroḥ sutam
mbh_01.002.185 bhīmasenabhayād yatra daivenābhipracoditaḥ
mbh_01.002.185 apāṇḍavāyeti ruṣā drauṇir astram avāsr̥jat
mbh_01.002.186 maivam ity abravīt kr̥ṣṇaḥ śamayaṁs tasya tad vacaḥ
mbh_01.002.186 yatrāstram astreṇa ca tac chamayām āsa phālgunaḥ
mbh_01.002.187 drauṇidvaipāyanādīnāṁ śāpāś cānyonyakāritāḥ
mbh_01.002.187 toyakarmaṇi sarveṣāṁ rājñām udakadānike
mbh_01.002.188 gūḍhotpannasya cākhyānaṁ karṇasya pr̥thayātmanaḥ
mbh_01.002.188 sutasyaitad iha proktaṁ daśamaṁ parva sauptikam
mbh_01.002.189 aṣṭādaśāsminn adhyāyāḥ parvaṇy uktā mahātmanā
mbh_01.002.189 ślokāgram atra kathitaṁ śatāny aṣṭau tathaiva ca
mbh_01.002.190 ślokāś ca saptatiḥ proktā yathāvad abhisaṁkhyayā
mbh_01.002.190 sauptikaiṣīkasaṁbandhe parvaṇy amitabuddhinā
mbh_01.002.191 ata ūrdhvam idaṁ prāhuḥ strīparva karuṇodayam
mbh_01.002.191 vilāpo vīrapatnīnāṁ yatrātikaruṇaḥ smr̥taḥ
mbh_01.002.191 krodhāveśaḥ prasādaś ca gāndhārīdhr̥tarāṣṭrayoḥ
mbh_01.002.192 yatra tān kṣatriyāñ śūrān diṣṭāntān anivartinaḥ
mbh_01.002.192 putrān bhrātr̥̄n pitr̥̄ṁś caiva dadr̥śur nihatān raṇe
mbh_01.002.193 yatra rājā mahāprājñaḥ sarvadharmabhr̥tāṁ varaḥ
mbh_01.002.193 rājñāṁ tāni śarīrāṇi dāhayām āsa śāstrataḥ
mbh_01.002.194 etad ekādaśaṁ proktaṁ parvātikaruṇaṁ mahat
mbh_01.002.194 saptaviṁśatir adhyāyāḥ parvaṇy asminn udāhr̥tāḥ
mbh_01.002.195 ślokāḥ saptaśataṁ cātra pañcasaptatir ucyate
mbh_01.002.195 saṁkhyayā bhāratākhyānaṁ kartrā hy atra mahātmanā
mbh_01.002.195 praṇītaṁ sajjanamanovaiklavyāśrupravartakam
mbh_01.002.196 ataḥ paraṁ śāntiparva dvādaśaṁ buddhivardhanam
mbh_01.002.196 yatra nirvedam āpanno dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
mbh_01.002.196 ghātayitvā pitr̥̄n bhrātr̥̄n putrān saṁbandhibāndhavān
mbh_01.002.197 śāntiparvaṇi dharmāś ca vyākhyātāḥ śaratalpikāḥ
mbh_01.002.197 rājabhir veditavyā ye samyaṅ nayabubhutsubhiḥ
mbh_01.002.198 āpaddharmāś ca tatraiva kālahetupradarśakāḥ
mbh_01.002.198 yān buddhvā puruṣaḥ samyak sarvajñatvam avāpnuyāt
mbh_01.002.198 mokṣadharmāś ca kathitā vicitrā bahuvistarāḥ
mbh_01.002.199 dvādaśaṁ parva nirdiṣṭam etat prājñajanapriyam
mbh_01.002.199 parvaṇy atra parijñeyam adhyāyānāṁ śatatrayam
mbh_01.002.199 triṁśac caiva tathādhyāyā nava caiva tapodhanāḥ
mbh_01.002.200 ślokānāṁ tu sahasrāṇi kīrtitāni caturdaśa
mbh_01.002.200 pañca caiva śatāny āhuḥ pañcaviṁśatisaṁkhyayā
mbh_01.002.201 ata ūrdhvaṁ tu vijñeyam ānuśāsanam uttamam
mbh_01.002.201 yatra prakr̥tim āpannaḥ śrutvā dharmaviniścayam
mbh_01.002.201 bhīṣmād bhāgīrathīputrāt kururājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
mbh_01.002.202 vyavahāro ’tra kārtsnyena dharmārthīyo nidarśitaḥ
mbh_01.002.202 vividhānāṁ ca dānānāṁ phalayogāḥ pr̥thagvidhāḥ
mbh_01.002.203 tathā pātraviśeṣāś ca dānānāṁ ca paro vidhiḥ
mbh_01.002.203 ācāravidhiyogaś ca satyasya ca parā gatiḥ
mbh_01.002.204 etat subahuvr̥ttāntam uttamaṁ cānuśāsanam
mbh_01.002.204 bhīṣmasyātraiva saṁprāptiḥ svargasya parikīrtitā
mbh_01.002.205 etat trayodaśaṁ parva dharmaniścayakārakam
mbh_01.002.205 adhyāyānāṁ śataṁ cātra ṣaṭcatvāriṁśad eva ca
mbh_01.002.205 ślokānāṁ tu sahasrāṇi ṣaṭ saptaiva śatāni ca
mbh_01.002.206 tato ’śvamedhikaṁ nāma parva proktaṁ caturdaśam
mbh_01.002.206 tat saṁvartamaruttīyaṁ yatrākhyānam anuttamam
mbh_01.002.207 suvarṇakośasaṁprāptir janma coktaṁ parikṣitaḥ
mbh_01.002.207 dagdhasyāstrāgninā pūrvaṁ kr̥ṣṇāt saṁjīvanaṁ punaḥ
mbh_01.002.208 caryāyāṁ hayam utsr̥ṣṭaṁ pāṇḍavasyānugacchataḥ
mbh_01.002.208 tatra tatra ca yuddhāni rājaputrair amarṣaṇaiḥ
mbh_01.002.209 citrāṅgadāyāḥ putreṇa putrikāyā dhanaṁjayaḥ
mbh_01.002.209 saṁgrāme babhruvāhena saṁśayaṁ cātra darśitaḥ
mbh_01.002.209 aśvamedhe mahāyajñe nakulākhyānam eva ca
mbh_01.002.210 ity āśvamedhikaṁ parva proktam etan mahādbhutam
mbh_01.002.210 atrādhyāyaśataṁ triṁśat trayo ’dhyāyāś ca śabditāḥ
mbh_01.002.211 trīṇi ślokasahasrāṇi tāvanty eva śatāni ca
mbh_01.002.211 viṁśatiś ca tathā ślokāḥ saṁkhyātās tattvadarśinā
mbh_01.002.212 tata āśramavāsākyaṁ parva pañcadaśaṁ smr̥tam
mbh_01.002.212 yatra rājyaṁ parityajya gāndhārīsahito nr̥paḥ
mbh_01.002.212 dhr̥tarāṣṭrāśramapadaṁ viduraś ca jagāma ha
mbh_01.002.213 yaṁ dr̥ṣṭvā prasthitaṁ sādhvī pr̥thāpy anuyayau tadā
mbh_01.002.213 putrarājyaṁ parityajya guruśuśrūṣaṇe ratā
mbh_01.002.214 yatra rājā hatān putrān pautrān anyāṁś ca pārthivān
mbh_01.002.214 lokāntaragatān vīrān apaśyat punarāgatān
mbh_01.002.215 r̥ṣeḥ prasādāt kr̥ṣṇasya dr̥ṣṭvāścaryam anuttamam
mbh_01.002.215 tyaktvā śokaṁ sadāraś ca siddhiṁ paramikāṁ gataḥ
mbh_01.002.216 yatra dharmaṁ samāśritya viduraḥ sugatiṁ gataḥ
mbh_01.002.216 saṁjayaś ca mahāmātro vidvān gāvalgaṇir vaśī
mbh_01.002.217 dadarśa nāradaṁ yatra dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
mbh_01.002.217 nāradāc caiva śuśrāva vr̥ṣṇīnāṁ kadanaṁ mahat
mbh_01.002.218 etad āśramavāsākhyaṁ pūrvoktaṁ sumahādbhutam
mbh_01.002.218 dvicatvāriṁśad adhyāyāḥ parvaitad abhisaṁkhyayā
mbh_01.002.219 sahasram ekaṁ ślokānāṁ pañca ślokaśatāni ca
mbh_01.002.219 ṣaḍ eva ca tathā ślokāḥ saṁkhyātās tattvadarśinā
mbh_01.002.220 ataḥ paraṁ nibodhedaṁ mausalaṁ parva dāruṇam
mbh_01.002.220 yatra te puruṣavyāghrāḥ śastrasparśasahā yudhi
mbh_01.002.220 brahmadaṇḍaviniṣpiṣṭāḥ samīpe lavaṇāmbhasaḥ
mbh_01.002.221 āpāne pānagalitā daivenābhipracoditāḥ
mbh_01.002.221 erakārūpibhir vajrair nijaghnur itaretaram
mbh_01.002.222 yatra sarvakṣayaṁ kr̥tvā tāv ubhau rāmakeśavau
mbh_01.002.222 nāticakramatuḥ kālaṁ prāptaṁ sarvaharaṁ samam
mbh_01.002.223 yatrārjuno dvāravatīm etya vr̥ṣṇivinākr̥tām
mbh_01.002.223 dr̥ṣṭvā viṣādam agamat parāṁ cārtiṁ nararṣabhaḥ
mbh_01.002.224 sa satkr̥tya yaduśreṣṭhaṁ mātulaṁ śaurim ātmanaḥ
mbh_01.002.224 dadarśa yaduvīrāṇām āpāne vaiśasaṁ mahat
mbh_01.002.225 śarīraṁ vāsudevasya rāmasya ca mahātmanaḥ
mbh_01.002.225 saṁskāraṁ lambhayām āsa vr̥ṣṇīnāṁ ca pradhānataḥ
mbh_01.002.226 sa vr̥ddhabālam ādāya dvāravatyās tato janam
mbh_01.002.226 dadarśāpadi kaṣṭāyāṁ gāṇḍīvasya parābhavam
mbh_01.002.227 sarveṣāṁ caiva divyānām astrāṇām aprasannatām
mbh_01.002.227 nāśaṁ vr̥ṣṇikalatrāṇāṁ prabhāvānām anityatām
mbh_01.002.228 dr̥ṣṭvā nirvedam āpanno vyāsavākyapracoditaḥ
mbh_01.002.228 dharmarājaṁ samāsādya saṁnyāsaṁ samarocayet
mbh_01.002.229 ity etan mausalaṁ parva ṣoḍaśaṁ parikīrtitam
mbh_01.002.229 adhyāyāṣṭau samākhyātāḥ ślokānāṁ ca śatatrayam
mbh_01.002.230 mahāprasthānikaṁ tasmād ūrdhvaṁ saptadaśaṁ smr̥tam
mbh_01.002.230 yatra rājyaṁ parityajya pāṇḍavāḥ puruṣarṣabhāḥ
mbh_01.002.230 draupadyā sahitā devyā siddhiṁ paramikāṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.002.231 atrādhyāyās trayaḥ proktāḥ ślokānāṁ ca śataṁ tathā
mbh_01.002.231 viṁśatiś ca tathā ślokāḥ saṁkhyātās tattvadarśinā
mbh_01.002.232 svargaparva tato jñeyaṁ divyaṁ yat tad amānuṣam
mbh_01.002.232 adhyāyāḥ pañca saṁkhyātāḥ parvaitad abhisaṁkhyayā
mbh_01.002.232 ślokānāṁ dve śate caiva prasaṁkhyāte tapodhanāḥ
mbh_01.002.233 aṣṭādaśaivam etāni parvāṇy uktāny aśeṣataḥ
mbh_01.002.233 khileṣu harivaṁśaś ca bhaviṣyac ca prakīrtitam
mbh_01.002.234 etad akhilam ākhyātaṁ bhārataṁ parvasaṁgrahāt
mbh_01.002.234 aṣṭādaśa samājagmur akṣauhiṇyo yuyutsayā
mbh_01.002.234 tan mahad dāruṇaṁ yuddham ahāny aṣṭādaśābhavat
mbh_01.002.235 yo vidyāc caturo vedān sāṅgopaniṣadān dvijaḥ
mbh_01.002.235 na cākhyānam idaṁ vidyān naiva sa syād vicakṣaṇaḥ
mbh_01.002.236 śrutvā tv idam upākhyānaṁ śrāvyam anyan na rocate
mbh_01.002.236 puṁskokilarutaṁ śrutvā rūkṣā dhvāṅkṣasya vāg iva
mbh_01.002.237 itihāsottamād asmāj jāyante kavibuddhayaḥ
mbh_01.002.237 pañcabhya iva bhūtebhyo lokasaṁvidhayas trayaḥ
mbh_01.002.238 asyākhyānasya viṣaye purāṇaṁ vartate dvijāḥ
mbh_01.002.238 antarikṣasya viṣaye prajā iva caturvidhāḥ
mbh_01.002.239 kriyāguṇānāṁ sarveṣām idam ākhyānam āśrayaḥ
mbh_01.002.239 indriyāṇāṁ samastānāṁ citrā iva manaḥkriyāḥ
mbh_01.002.240 anāśrityaitad ākhyānaṁ kathā bhuvi na vidyate
mbh_01.002.240 āhāram anapāśritya śarīrasyeva dhāraṇam
mbh_01.002.241 idaṁ sarvaiḥ kavivarair ākhyānam upajīvyate
mbh_01.002.241 udayaprepsubhir bhr̥tyair abhijāta iveśvaraḥ
mbh_01.002.242 dvaipāyanauṣṭhapuṭaniḥsr̥tam aprameyaṁ; puṇyaṁ pavitram atha pāpaharaṁ śivaṁ ca
mbh_01.002.242 yo bhārataṁ samadhigacchati vācyamānaṁ; kiṁ tasya puṣkarajalair abhiṣecanena
mbh_01.002.243 ākhyānaṁ tad idam anuttamaṁ mahārthaṁ; vinyastaṁ mahad iha parvasaṁgraheṇa
mbh_01.002.243 śrutvādau bhavati nr̥ṇāṁ sukhāvagāhaṁ; vistīrṇaṁ lavaṇajalaṁ yathā plavena

## Chapter: Mahabharata — Parva 1, Chapter 3
<<<
mbh_01.003.001 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.003.001 janamejayaḥ pārikṣitaḥ saha bhrātr̥bhiḥ kurukṣetre dīrghasatram upāste
mbh_01.003.001 tasya bhrātaras trayaḥ śrutasena ugraseno bhīmasena iti
mbh_01.003.002 teṣu tat satram upāsīneṣu tatra śvābhyāgacchat sārameyaḥ
mbh_01.003.002 sa janamejayasya bhrātr̥bhir abhihato rorūyamāṇo mātuḥ samīpam upāgacchat
mbh_01.003.003 taṁ mātā rorūyamāṇam uvāca
mbh_01.003.003 kiṁ rodiṣi
mbh_01.003.003 kenāsy abhihata iti
mbh_01.003.004 sa evam ukto mātaraṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.004 janamejayasya bhrātr̥bhir abhihato ’smīti
mbh_01.003.005 taṁ mātā pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.005 vyaktaṁ tvayā tatrāparāddhaṁ yenāsy abhihata iti
mbh_01.003.006 sa tāṁ punar uvāca
mbh_01.003.006 nāparādhyāmi kiṁ cit
mbh_01.003.006 nāvekṣe havīṁṣi nāvaliha iti
mbh_01.003.007 tac chrutvā tasya mātā saramā putraśokārtā tat satram upāgacchad yatra sa janamejayaḥ saha bhrātr̥bhir dīrghasatram upāste
mbh_01.003.008 sa tayā kruddhayā tatroktaḥ
mbh_01.003.008 ayaṁ me putro na kiṁ cid aparādhyati
mbh_01.003.008 kimartham abhihata iti
mbh_01.003.008 yasmāc cāyam abhihato ’napakārī tasmād adr̥ṣṭaṁ tvāṁ bhayam āgamiṣyatīti
mbh_01.003.009 sa janamejaya evam ukto devaśunyā saramayā dr̥ḍhaṁ saṁbhrānto viṣaṇṇaś cāsīt
mbh_01.003.010 sa tasmin satre samāpte hāstinapuraṁ pratyetya purohitam anurūpam anvicchamānaḥ paraṁ yatnam akarod yo me pāpakr̥tyāṁ śamayed iti
mbh_01.003.011 sa kadā cin mr̥gayāṁ yātaḥ pārikṣito janamejayaḥ kasmiṁś cit svaviṣayoddeśe āśramam apaśyat
mbh_01.003.012 tatra kaś cid r̥ṣir āsāṁ cakre śrutaśravā nāma
mbh_01.003.012 tasyābhimataḥ putra āste somaśravā nāma
mbh_01.003.013 tasya taṁ putram abhigamya janamejayaḥ pārikṣitaḥ paurohityāya vavre
mbh_01.003.014 sa namaskr̥tya tam r̥ṣim uvāca
mbh_01.003.014 bhagavann ayaṁ tava putro mama purohito ’stv iti
mbh_01.003.015 sa evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.015 bho janamejaya putro ’yaṁ mama sarpyāṁ jātaḥ
mbh_01.003.015 mahātapasvī svādhyāyasaṁpanno mattapovīryasaṁbhr̥to macchukraṁ pītavatyās tasyāḥ kukṣau saṁvr̥ddhaḥ
mbh_01.003.015 samartho ’yaṁ bhavataḥ sarvāḥ pāpakr̥tyāḥ śamayitum antareṇa mahādevakr̥tyām
mbh_01.003.015 asya tv ekam upāṁśuvratam
mbh_01.003.015 yad enaṁ kaś cid brāhmaṇaḥ kaṁ cid artham abhiyācet taṁ tasmai dadyād ayam
mbh_01.003.015 yady etad utsahase tato nayasvainam iti
mbh_01.003.016 tenaivam ukto janamejayas taṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.016 bhagavaṁs tathā bhaviṣyatīti
mbh_01.003.017 sa taṁ purohitam upādāyopāvr̥tto bhrātr̥̄n uvāca
mbh_01.003.017 mayāyaṁ vr̥ta upādhyāyaḥ
mbh_01.003.017 yad ayaṁ brūyāt tat kāryam avicārayadbhir iti
mbh_01.003.018 tenaivam uktā bhrātaras tasya tathā cakruḥ
mbh_01.003.018 sa tathā bhrātr̥̄n saṁdiśya takṣaśilāṁ pratyabhipratasthe
mbh_01.003.018 taṁ ca deśaṁ vaśe sthāpayām āsa
mbh_01.003.019 etasminn antare kaś cid r̥ṣir dhaumyo nāmāyodaḥ
mbh_01.003.019 tasya śiṣyās trayo babhūvur upamanyur āruṇir vedaś ceti
mbh_01.003.020 sa ekaṁ śiṣyam āruṇiṁ pāñcālyaṁ preṣayām āsa
mbh_01.003.020 gaccha kedārakhaṇḍaṁ badhāneti
mbh_01.003.021 sa upādhyāyena saṁdiṣṭa āruṇiḥ pāñcālyas tatra gatvā tat kedārakhaṇḍaṁ baddhuṁ nāśaknot
mbh_01.003.022 sa kliśyamāno ’paśyad upāyam
mbh_01.003.022 bhavatv evaṁ kariṣyāmīti
mbh_01.003.023 sa tatra saṁviveśa kedārakhaṇḍe
mbh_01.003.023 śayāne tasmiṁs tad udakaṁ tasthau
mbh_01.003.024 tataḥ kadā cid upādhyāya āyodo dhaumyaḥ śiṣyān apr̥cchat
mbh_01.003.024 kva āruṇiḥ pāñcālyo gata iti
mbh_01.003.025 te pratyūcuḥ
mbh_01.003.025 bhagavataiva preṣito gaccha kedārakhaṇḍaṁ badhāneti
mbh_01.003.026 sa evam uktas tāñ śiṣyān pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.026 tasmāt sarve tatra gacchāmo yatra sa iti
mbh_01.003.027 sa tatra gatvā tasyāhvānāya śabdaṁ cakāra
mbh_01.003.027 bho āruṇe pāñcālya kvāsi
mbh_01.003.027 vatsaihīti
mbh_01.003.028 sa tac chrutvā āruṇir upādhyāyavākyaṁ tasmāt kedārakhaṇḍāt sahasotthāya tam upādhyāyam upatasthe
mbh_01.003.028 provāca cainam
mbh_01.003.028 ayam asmy atra kedārakhaṇḍe niḥsaramāṇam udakam avāraṇīyaṁ saṁroddhuṁ saṁviṣṭo bhagavacchabdaṁ śrutvaiva sahasā vidārya kedārakhaṇḍaṁ bhavantam upasthitaḥ
mbh_01.003.028 tad abhivādaye bhagavantam
mbh_01.003.028 ājñāpayatu bhavān
mbh_01.003.028 kiṁ karavāṇīti
mbh_01.003.029 tam upādhyāyo ’bravīt
mbh_01.003.029 yasmād bhavān kedārakhaṇḍam avadāryotthitas tasmād bhavān uddālaka eva nāmnā bhaviṣyatīti
mbh_01.003.030 sa upādhyāyenānugr̥hītaḥ
mbh_01.003.030 yasmāt tvayā madvaco ’nuṣṭhitaṁ tasmāc chreyo ’vāpsyasīti
mbh_01.003.030 sarve ca te vedāḥ pratibhāsyanti sarvāṇi ca dharmaśāstrāṇīti
mbh_01.003.031 sa evam ukta upādhyāyeneṣṭaṁ deśaṁ jagāma
mbh_01.003.032 athāparaḥ śiṣyas tasyaivāyodasya dhaumyasyopamanyur nāma
mbh_01.003.033 tam upādhyāyaḥ preṣayām āsa
mbh_01.003.033 vatsopamanyo gā rakṣasveti
mbh_01.003.034 sa upādhyāyavacanād arakṣad gāḥ
mbh_01.003.034 sa cāhani gā rakṣitvā divasakṣaye ’bhyāgamyopādhyāyasyāgrataḥ sthitvā namaścakre
mbh_01.003.035 tam upādhyāyaḥ pīvānam apaśyat
mbh_01.003.035 uvāca cainam
mbh_01.003.035 vatsopamanyo kena vr̥ttiṁ kalpayasi
mbh_01.003.035 pīvān asi dr̥ḍham iti
mbh_01.003.036 sa upādhyāyaṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.036 bhaikṣeṇa vr̥ttiṁ kalpayāmīti
mbh_01.003.037 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.037 mamānivedya bhaikṣaṁ nopayoktavyam iti
mbh_01.003.038 sa tathety uktvā punar arakṣad gāḥ
mbh_01.003.038 rakṣitvā cāgamya tathaivopādhyāyasyāgrataḥ sthitvā namaścakre
mbh_01.003.039 tam upādhyāyas tathāpi pīvānam eva dr̥ṣṭvovāca
mbh_01.003.039 vatsopamanyo sarvam aśeṣatas te bhaikṣaṁ gr̥hṇāmi
mbh_01.003.039 kenedānīṁ vr̥ttiṁ kalpayasīti
mbh_01.003.040 sa evam ukta upādhyāyena pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.040 bhagavate nivedya pūrvam aparaṁ carāmi
mbh_01.003.040 tena vr̥ttiṁ kalpayāmīti
mbh_01.003.041 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.041 naiṣā nyāyyā guruvr̥ttiḥ
mbh_01.003.041 anyeṣām api vr̥ttyuparodhaṁ karoṣy evaṁ vartamānaḥ
mbh_01.003.041 lubdho ’sīti
mbh_01.003.042 sa tathety uktvā gā arakṣat
mbh_01.003.042 rakṣitvā ca punar upādhyāyagr̥ham āgamyopādhyāyasyāgrataḥ sthitvā namaścakre
mbh_01.003.043 tam upādhyāyas tathāpi pīvānam eva dr̥ṣṭvā punar uvāca
mbh_01.003.043 ahaṁ te sarvaṁ bhaikṣaṁ gr̥hṇāmi na cānyac carasi
mbh_01.003.043 pīvān asi
mbh_01.003.043 kena vr̥ttiṁ kalpayasīti
mbh_01.003.044 sa upādhyāyaṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.044 bho etāsāṁ gavāṁ payasā vr̥ttiṁ kalpayāmīti
mbh_01.003.045 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.045 naitan nyāyyaṁ paya upayoktuṁ bhavato mayānanujñātam iti
mbh_01.003.046 sa tatheti pratijñāya gā rakṣitvā punar upādhyāyagr̥hān etya guror agrataḥ sthitvā namaścakre
mbh_01.003.047 tam upādhyāyaḥ pīvānam evāpaśyat
mbh_01.003.047 uvāca cainam
mbh_01.003.047 bhaikṣaṁ nāśnāsi na cānyac carasi
mbh_01.003.047 payo na pibasi
mbh_01.003.047 pīvān asi
mbh_01.003.047 kena vr̥ttiṁ kalpayasīti
mbh_01.003.048 sa evam ukta upādhyāyaṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.048 bhoḥ phenaṁ pibāmi yam ime vatsā mātr̥̄ṇāṁ stanaṁ pibanta udgirantīti
mbh_01.003.049 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.049 ete tvadanukampayā guṇavanto vatsāḥ prabhūtataraṁ phenam udgiranti
mbh_01.003.049 tad evam api vatsānāṁ vr̥ttyuparodhaṁ karoṣy evaṁ vartamānaḥ
mbh_01.003.049 phenam api bhavān na pātum arhatīti
mbh_01.003.050 sa tatheti pratijñāya nirāhāras tā gā arakṣat
mbh_01.003.050 tathā pratiṣiddho bhaikṣaṁ nāśnāti na cānyac carati
mbh_01.003.050 payo na pibati
mbh_01.003.050 phenaṁ nopayuṅkte
mbh_01.003.051 sa kadā cid araṇye kṣudhārto ’rkapatrāṇy abhakṣayat
mbh_01.003.052 sa tair arkapatrair bhakṣitaiḥ kṣārakaṭūṣṇavipākibhiś cakṣuṣy upahato ’ndho ’bhavat
mbh_01.003.052 so ’ndho ’pi caṅkramyamāṇaḥ kūpe ’patat
mbh_01.003.053 atha tasminn anāgacchaty upādhyāyaḥ śiṣyān avocat
mbh_01.003.053 mayopamanyuḥ sarvataḥ pratiṣiddhaḥ
mbh_01.003.053 sa niyataṁ kupitaḥ
mbh_01.003.053 tato nāgacchati ciragataś ceti
mbh_01.003.054 sa evam uktvā gatvāraṇyam upamanyor āhvānaṁ cakre
mbh_01.003.054 bho upamanyo kvāsi
mbh_01.003.054 vatsaihīti
mbh_01.003.055 sa tadāhvānam upādhyāyāc chrutvā pratyuvācoccaiḥ
mbh_01.003.055 ayam asmi bho upādhyāya kūpe patita iti
mbh_01.003.056 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.056 katham asi kūpe patita iti
mbh_01.003.057 sa taṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.057 arkapatrāṇi bhakṣayitvāndhībhūto ’smi
mbh_01.003.057 ataḥ kūpe patita iti
mbh_01.003.058 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.058 aśvinau stuhi
mbh_01.003.058 tau tvāṁ cakṣuṣmantaṁ kariṣyato devabhiṣajāv iti
mbh_01.003.059 sa evam ukta upādhyāyena stotuṁ pracakrame devāv aśvinau vāgbhir r̥gbhiḥ
mbh_01.003.060 pra pūrvagau pūrvajau citrabhānū; girā vā śaṁsāmi tapanāv anantau
mbh_01.003.060 divyau suparṇau virajau vimānāv; adhikṣiyantau bhuvanāni viśvā
mbh_01.003.061 hiraṇmayau śakunī sāṁparāyau; nāsatyadasrau sunasau vaijayantau
mbh_01.003.061 śukraṁ vayantau tarasā suvemāv; abhi vyayantāv asitaṁ vivasvat
mbh_01.003.062 grastāṁ suparṇasya balena vartikām; amuñcatām aśvinau saubhagāya
mbh_01.003.062 tāvat suvr̥ttāv anamanta māyayā; sattamā gā aruṇā udāvahan
mbh_01.003.063 ṣaṣṭiś ca gāvas triśatāś ca dhenava; ekaṁ vatsaṁ suvate taṁ duhanti
mbh_01.003.063 nānāgoṣṭhā vihitā ekadohanās; tāv aśvinau duhato gharmam ukthyam
mbh_01.003.064 ekāṁ nābhiṁ saptaśatā arāḥ śritāḥ; pradhiṣv anyā viṁśatir arpitā arāḥ
mbh_01.003.064 anemi cakraṁ parivartate ’jaraṁ; māyāśvinau samanakti carṣaṇī
mbh_01.003.065 ekaṁ cakraṁ vartate dvādaśāraṁ pradhi;ṣaṇṇābhim ekākṣam amr̥tasya dhāraṇam
mbh_01.003.065 yasmin devā adhi viśve viṣaktās; tāv aśvinau muñcato mā viṣīdatam
mbh_01.003.066 aśvināv indram amr̥taṁ vr̥ttabhūyau; tirodhattām aśvinau dāsapatnī
mbh_01.003.066 bhittvā girim aśvinau gām udācarantau; tadvr̥ṣṭamahnā prathitā valasya
mbh_01.003.067 yuvāṁ diśo janayatho daśāgre; samānaṁ mūrdhni rathayā viyanti
mbh_01.003.067 tāsāṁ yātam r̥ṣayo ’nuprayānti; devā manuṣyāḥ kṣitim ācaranti
mbh_01.003.068 yuvāṁ varṇān vikurutho viśvarūpāṁs; te ’dhikṣiyanti bhuvanāni viśvā
mbh_01.003.068 te bhānavo ’py anusr̥tāś caranti; devā manuṣyāḥ kṣitim ācaranti
mbh_01.003.069 tau nāsatyāv aśvināv āmahe vāṁ; srajaṁ ca yāṁ bibhr̥thaḥ puṣkarasya
mbh_01.003.069 tau nāsatyāv amr̥tāvr̥tāvr̥dhāv; r̥te devās tat prapadena sūte
mbh_01.003.070 mukhena garbhaṁ labhatāṁ yuvānau; gatāsur etat prapadena sūte
mbh_01.003.070 sadyo jāto mātaram atti garbhas; tāv aśvinau muñcatho jīvase gāḥ
mbh_01.003.071 evaṁ tenābhiṣṭutāv aśvināv ājagmatuḥ
mbh_01.003.071 āhatuś cainam
mbh_01.003.071 prītau svaḥ
mbh_01.003.071 eṣa te ’pūpaḥ
mbh_01.003.071 aśānainam iti
mbh_01.003.072 sa evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.072 nānr̥tam ūcatur bhavantau
mbh_01.003.072 na tv aham etam apūpam upayoktum utsahe anivedya gurava iti
mbh_01.003.073 tatas tam aśvināv ūcatuḥ
mbh_01.003.073 āvābhyāṁ purastād bhavata upādhyāyenaivam evābhiṣṭutābhyām apūpaḥ prītābhyāṁ dattaḥ
mbh_01.003.073 upayuktaś ca sa tenānivedya gurave
mbh_01.003.073 tvam api tathaiva kuruṣva yathā kr̥tam upādhyāyeneti
mbh_01.003.074 sa evam uktaḥ punar eva pratyuvācaitau
mbh_01.003.074 pratyanunaye bhavantāv aśvinau
mbh_01.003.074 notsahe ’ham anivedyopādhyāyāyopayoktum iti
mbh_01.003.075 tam aśvināv āhatuḥ
mbh_01.003.075 prītau svas tavānayā guruvr̥ttyā
mbh_01.003.075 upādhyāyasya te kārṣṇāyasā dantāḥ
mbh_01.003.075 bhavato hiraṇmayā bhaviṣyanti
mbh_01.003.075 cakṣuṣmāṁś ca bhaviṣyasi
mbh_01.003.075 śreyaś cāvāpsyasīti
mbh_01.003.076 sa evam ukto ’śvibhyāṁ labdhacakṣur upādhyāyasakāśam āgamyopādhyāyam abhivādyācacakṣe
mbh_01.003.076 sa cāsya prītimān abhūt
mbh_01.003.077 āha cainam
mbh_01.003.077 yathāśvināv āhatus tathā tvaṁ śreyo ’vāpsyasīti
mbh_01.003.077 sarve ca te vedāḥ pratibhāsyantīti
mbh_01.003.078 eṣā tasyāpi parīkṣopamanyoḥ
mbh_01.003.079 athāparaḥ śiṣyas tasyaivāyodasya dhaumyasya vedo nāma
mbh_01.003.080 tam upādhyāyaḥ saṁdideśa
mbh_01.003.080 vatsa veda ihāsyatām
mbh_01.003.080 bhavatā madgr̥he kaṁ cit kālaṁ śuśrūṣamāṇena bhavitavyam
mbh_01.003.080 śreyas te bhaviṣyatīti
mbh_01.003.081 sa tathety uktvā gurukule dīrghakālaṁ guruśuśrūṣaṇaparo ’vasat
mbh_01.003.081 gaur iva nityaṁ guruṣu dhūrṣu niyujyamānaḥ śītoṣṇakṣuttr̥ṣṇāduḥkhasahaḥ sarvatrāpratikūlaḥ
mbh_01.003.082 tasya mahatā kālena guruḥ paritoṣaṁ jagāma
mbh_01.003.082 tatparitoṣāc ca śreyaḥ sarvajñatāṁ cāvāpa
mbh_01.003.082 eṣā tasyāpi parīkṣā vedasya
mbh_01.003.083 sa upādhyāyenānujñātaḥ samāvr̥ttas tasmād gurukulavāsād gr̥hāśramaṁ pratyapadyata
mbh_01.003.083 tasyāpi svagr̥he vasatas trayaḥ śiṣyā babhūvuḥ
mbh_01.003.084 sa śiṣyān na kiṁ cid uvāca
mbh_01.003.084 karma vā kriyatāṁ guruśuśrūṣā veti
mbh_01.003.084 duḥkhābhijño hi gurukulavāsasya śiṣyān parikleśena yojayituṁ neyeṣa
mbh_01.003.085 atha kasya cit kālasya vedaṁ brāhmaṇaṁ janamejayaḥ pauṣyaś ca kṣatriyāv upetyopādhyāyaṁ varayāṁ cakratuḥ
mbh_01.003.086 sa kadā cid yājyakāryeṇābhiprasthita uttaṅkaṁ nāma śiṣyaṁ niyojayām āsa
mbh_01.003.086 bho uttaṅka yat kiṁ cid asmadgr̥he parihīyate tad icchāmy aham aparihīṇaṁ bhavatā kriyamāṇam iti
mbh_01.003.087 sa evaṁ pratisamādiśyottaṅkaṁ vedaḥ pravāsaṁ jagāma
mbh_01.003.088 athottaṅko guruśuśrūṣur guruniyogam anutiṣṭhamānas tatra gurukule vasati sma
mbh_01.003.089 sa vasaṁs tatropādhyāyastrībhiḥ sahitābhir āhūyoktaḥ
mbh_01.003.089 upādhyāyinī te r̥tumatī
mbh_01.003.089 upādhyāyaś ca proṣitaḥ
mbh_01.003.089 asyā yathāyam r̥tur vandhyo na bhavati tathā kriyatām
mbh_01.003.089 etad viṣīdatīti
mbh_01.003.090 sa evam uktas tāḥ striyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.090 na mayā strīṇāṁ vacanād idam akāryaṁ kāryam
mbh_01.003.090 na hy aham upādhyāyena saṁdiṣṭaḥ
mbh_01.003.090 akāryam api tvayā kāryam iti
mbh_01.003.091 tasya punar upādhyāyaḥ kālāntareṇa gr̥hān upajagāma tasmāt pravāsāt
mbh_01.003.091 sa tadvr̥ttaṁ tasyāśeṣam upalabhya prītimān abhūt
mbh_01.003.092 uvāca cainam
mbh_01.003.092 vatsottaṅka kiṁ te priyaṁ karavāṇīti
mbh_01.003.092 dharmato hi śuśrūṣito ’smi bhavatā
mbh_01.003.092 tena prītiḥ paraspareṇa nau saṁvr̥ddhā
mbh_01.003.092 tad anujāne bhavantam
mbh_01.003.092 sarvām eva siddhiṁ prāpsyasi
mbh_01.003.092 gamyatām iti
mbh_01.003.093 sa evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.093 kiṁ te priyaṁ karavāṇīti
mbh_01.003.093 evaṁ hy āhuḥ
mbh_01.003.094 yaś cādharmeṇa vibrūyād yaś cādharmeṇa pr̥cchati
mbh_01.003.094 tayor anyataraḥ praiti vidveṣaṁ cādhigacchati
mbh_01.003.095 so ’ham anujñāto bhavatā icchāmīṣṭaṁ te gurvartham upahartum iti
mbh_01.003.096 tenaivam ukta upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.096 vatsottaṅka uṣyatāṁ tāvad iti
mbh_01.003.097 sa kadā cit tam upādhyāyam āhottaṅkaḥ
mbh_01.003.097 ājñāpayatu bhavān
mbh_01.003.097 kiṁ te priyam upaharāmi gurvartham iti
mbh_01.003.098 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.098 vatsottaṅka bahuśo māṁ codayasi gurvartham upahareyam iti
mbh_01.003.098 tad gaccha
mbh_01.003.098 enāṁ praviśyopādhyāyinīṁ pr̥ccha kim upaharāmīti
mbh_01.003.098 eṣā yad bravīti tad upaharasveti
mbh_01.003.099 sa evam ukta upādhyāyenopādhyāyinīm apr̥cchat
mbh_01.003.099 bhavaty upādhyāyenāsmy anujñāto gr̥haṁ gantum
mbh_01.003.099 tad icchāmīṣṭaṁ te gurvartham upahr̥tyānr̥ṇo gantum
mbh_01.003.099 tad ājñāpayatu bhavatī
mbh_01.003.099 kim upaharāmi gurvartham iti
mbh_01.003.100 saivam uktopādhyāyiny uttaṅkaṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.100 gaccha pauṣyaṁ rājānam
mbh_01.003.100 bhikṣasva tasya kṣatriyayā pinaddhe kuṇḍale
mbh_01.003.100 te ānayasva
mbh_01.003.100 itaś caturthe ’hani puṇyakaṁ bhavitā
mbh_01.003.100 tābhyām ābaddhābhyāṁ brāhmaṇān pariveṣṭum icchāmi
mbh_01.003.100 śobhamānā yathā tābhyāṁ kuṇḍalābhyāṁ tasminn ahani saṁpādayasva
mbh_01.003.100 śreyo hi te syāt kṣaṇaṁ kurvata iti
mbh_01.003.101 sa evam ukta upādhyāyinyā prātiṣṭhatottaṅkaḥ
mbh_01.003.101 sa pathi gacchann apaśyad r̥ṣabham atipramāṇaṁ tam adhirūḍhaṁ ca puruṣam atipramāṇam eva
mbh_01.003.102 sa puruṣa uttaṅkam abhyabhāṣata
mbh_01.003.102 uttaṅkaitat purīṣam asya r̥ṣabhasya bhakṣayasveti
mbh_01.003.103 sa evam ukto naicchat
mbh_01.003.104 tam āha puruṣo bhūyaḥ
mbh_01.003.104 bhakṣayasvottaṅka
mbh_01.003.104 mā vicāraya
mbh_01.003.104 upādhyāyenāpi te bhakṣitaṁ pūrvam iti
mbh_01.003.105 sa evam ukto bāḍham ity uktvā tadā tad r̥ṣabhasya purīṣaṁ mūtraṁ ca bhakṣayitvottaṅkaḥ pratasthe yatra sa kṣatriyaḥ pauṣyaḥ
mbh_01.003.106 tam upetyāpaśyad uttaṅka āsīnam
mbh_01.003.106 sa tam upetyāśīrbhir abhinandyovāca
mbh_01.003.106 arthī bhavantam upagato ’smīti
mbh_01.003.107 sa enam abhivādyovāca
mbh_01.003.107 bhagavan pauṣyaḥ khalv aham
mbh_01.003.107 kiṁ karavāṇīti
mbh_01.003.108 tam uvācottaṅkaḥ
mbh_01.003.108 gurvarthe kuṇḍalābhyām arthy āgato ’smīti ye te kṣatriyayā pinaddhe kuṇḍale te bhavān dātum arhatīti
mbh_01.003.109 taṁ pauṣyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.109 praviśyāntaḥpuraṁ kṣatriyā yācyatām iti
mbh_01.003.110 sa tenaivam uktaḥ praviśyāntaḥpuraṁ kṣatriyāṁ nāpaśyat
mbh_01.003.111 sa pauṣyaṁ punar uvāca
mbh_01.003.111 na yuktaṁ bhavatā vayam anr̥tenopacaritum
mbh_01.003.111 na hi te kṣatriyāntaḥpure saṁnihitā
mbh_01.003.111 naināṁ paśyāmīti
mbh_01.003.112 sa evam uktaḥ pauṣyas taṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.112 saṁprati bhavān ucchiṣṭaḥ
mbh_01.003.112 smara tāvat
mbh_01.003.112 na hi sā kṣatriyā ucchiṣṭenāśucinā vā śakyā draṣṭum
mbh_01.003.112 pativratātvād eṣā nāśucer darśanam upaitīti
mbh_01.003.113 athaivam ukta uttaṅkaḥ smr̥tvovāca
mbh_01.003.113 asti khalu mayocchiṣṭenopaspr̥ṣṭaṁ śīghraṁ gacchatā ceti
mbh_01.003.114 taṁ pauṣyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.114 etat tad evaṁ hi
mbh_01.003.114 na gacchatopaspr̥ṣṭaṁ bhavati na sthiteneti
mbh_01.003.115 athottaṅkas tathety uktvā prāṅmukha upaviśya suprakṣālitapāṇipādavadano ’śabdābhir hr̥dayaṁgamābhir adbhir upaspr̥śya triḥ pītvā dviḥ parimr̥jya khāny adbhir upaspr̥śyāntaḥpuraṁ praviśya tāṁ kṣatriyām apaśyat
mbh_01.003.116 sā ca dr̥ṣṭvaivottaṅkam abhyutthāyābhivādyovāca
mbh_01.003.116 svāgataṁ te bhagavan
mbh_01.003.116 ājñāpaya kiṁ karavāṇīti
mbh_01.003.117 sa tām uvāca
mbh_01.003.117 ete kuṇḍale gurvarthaṁ me bhikṣite dātum arhasīti
mbh_01.003.118 sā prītā tena tasya sadbhāvena pātram ayam anatikramaṇīyaś ceti matvā te kuṇḍale avamucyāsmai prāyacchat
mbh_01.003.119 āha cainam
mbh_01.003.119 ete kuṇḍale takṣako nāgarājaḥ prārthayati
mbh_01.003.119 apramatto netum arhasīti
mbh_01.003.120 sa evam uktas tāṁ kṣatriyāṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.120 bhavati sunirvr̥tā bhava
mbh_01.003.120 na māṁ śaktas takṣako nāgarājo dharṣayitum iti
mbh_01.003.121 sa evam uktvā tāṁ kṣatriyām āmantrya pauṣyasakāśam āgacchat
mbh_01.003.122 sa taṁ dr̥ṣṭvovāca
mbh_01.003.122 bhoḥ pauṣya prīto ’smīti
mbh_01.003.123 taṁ pauṣyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.123 bhagavaṁś cirasya pātram āsādyate
mbh_01.003.123 bhavāṁś ca guṇavān atithiḥ
mbh_01.003.123 tat kariṣye śrāddham
mbh_01.003.123 kṣaṇaḥ kriyatām iti
mbh_01.003.124 tam uttaṅkaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.124 kr̥takṣaṇa evāsmi
mbh_01.003.124 śīghram icchāmi yathopapannam annam upahr̥taṁ bhavateti
mbh_01.003.125 sa tathety uktvā yathopapannenānnenainaṁ bhojayām āsa
mbh_01.003.126 athottaṅkaḥ śītam annaṁ sakeśaṁ dr̥ṣṭvā aśucy etad iti matvā pauṣyam uvāca
mbh_01.003.126 yasmān me aśucy annaṁ dadāsi tasmad andho bhaviṣyasīti
mbh_01.003.127 taṁ pauṣyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.127 yasmāt tvam apy aduṣṭam annaṁ dūṣayasi tasmād anapatyo bhaviṣyasīti
mbh_01.003.128 so ’tha pauṣyas tasyāśucibhāvam annasyāgamayām āsa
mbh_01.003.129 atha tadannaṁ muktakeśyā striyopahr̥taṁ sakeśam aśuci matvottaṅkaṁ prasādayām āsa
mbh_01.003.129 bhagavann ajñānād etad annaṁ sakeśam upahr̥taṁ śītaṁ ca
mbh_01.003.129 tat kṣāmaye bhavantam
mbh_01.003.129 na bhaveyam andha iti
mbh_01.003.130 tam uttaṅkaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.130 na mr̥ṣā bravīmi
mbh_01.003.130 bhūtvā tvam andho nacirād anandho bhaviṣyasīti
mbh_01.003.130 mamāpi śāpo na bhaved bhavatā datta iti
mbh_01.003.131 taṁ pauṣyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.131 nāhaṁ śaktaḥ śāpaṁ pratyādātum
mbh_01.003.131 na hi me manyur adyāpy upaśamaṁ gacchati
mbh_01.003.131 kiṁ caitad bhavatā na jñāyate yathā
mbh_01.003.132 nāvanītaṁ hr̥dayaṁ brāhmaṇasya; vāci kṣuro nihitas tīkṣṇadhāraḥ
mbh_01.003.132 viparītam etad ubhayaṁ kṣatriyasya; vāṅ nāvanītī hr̥dayaṁ tīkṣṇadhāram
mbh_01.003.133 iti
mbh_01.003.133 tad evaṁ gate na śakto ’haṁ tīkṣṇahr̥dayatvāt taṁ śāpam anyathā kartum
mbh_01.003.133 gamyatām iti
mbh_01.003.134 tam uttaṅkaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.134 bhavatāham annasyāśucibhāvam āgamayya pratyanunītaḥ
mbh_01.003.134 prāk ca te ’bhihitam
mbh_01.003.134 yasmād aduṣṭam annaṁ dūṣayasi tasmād anapatyo bhaviṣyasīti
mbh_01.003.134 duṣṭe cānne naiṣa mama śāpo bhaviṣyatīti
mbh_01.003.135 sādhayāmas tāvad ity uktvā prātiṣṭhatottaṅkas te kuṇḍale gr̥hītvā
mbh_01.003.136 so ’paśyat pathi nagnaṁ śramaṇam āgacchantaṁ muhur muhur dr̥śyamānam adr̥śyamānaṁ ca
mbh_01.003.136 athottaṅkas te kuṇḍale bhūmau nikṣipyodakārthaṁ pracakrame
mbh_01.003.137 etasminn antare sa śramaṇas tvaramāṇa upasr̥tya te kuṇḍale gr̥hītvā prādravat
mbh_01.003.137 tam uttaṅko ’bhisr̥tya jagrāha
mbh_01.003.137 sa tad rūpaṁ vihāya takṣakarūpaṁ kr̥tvā sahasā dharaṇyāṁ vivr̥taṁ mahābilaṁ viveśa
mbh_01.003.138 praviśya ca nāgalokaṁ svabhavanam agacchat
mbh_01.003.138 tam uttaṅko ’nvāviveśa tenaiva bilena
mbh_01.003.138 praviśya ca nāgān astuvad ebhiḥ ślokaiḥ
mbh_01.003.139 ya airāvatarājānaḥ sarpāḥ samitiśobhanāḥ
mbh_01.003.139 varṣanta iva jīmūtāḥ savidyutpavaneritāḥ
mbh_01.003.140 surūpāś ca virūpāś ca tathā kalmāṣakuṇḍalāḥ
mbh_01.003.140 ādityavan nākapr̥ṣṭhe rejur airāvatodbhavāḥ
mbh_01.003.141 bahūni nāgavartmāni gaṅgāyās tīra uttare
mbh_01.003.141 icchet ko ’rkāṁśusenāyāṁ cartum airāvataṁ vinā
mbh_01.003.142 śatāny aśītir aṣṭau ca sahasrāṇi ca viṁśatiḥ
mbh_01.003.142 sarpāṇāṁ pragrahā yānti dhr̥tarāṣṭro yad ejati
mbh_01.003.143 ye cainam upasarpanti ye ca dūraṁ paraṁ gatāḥ
mbh_01.003.143 aham airāvatajyeṣṭhabhrātr̥bhyo ’karavaṁ namaḥ
mbh_01.003.144 yasya vāsaḥ kurukṣetre khāṇḍave cābhavat sadā
mbh_01.003.144 taṁ kādraveyam astauṣaṁ kuṇḍalārthāya takṣakam
mbh_01.003.145 takṣakaś cāśvasenaś ca nityaṁ sahacarāv ubhau
mbh_01.003.145 kurukṣetre nivasatāṁ nadīm ikṣumatīm anu
mbh_01.003.146 jaghanyajas takṣakasya śrutaseneti yaḥ śrutaḥ
mbh_01.003.146 avasadyo mahad dyumni prārthayan nāgamukhyatām
mbh_01.003.146 karavāṇi sadā cāhaṁ namas tasmai mahātmane
mbh_01.003.147 evaṁ stuvann api nāgān yadā te kuṇḍale nālabhad athāpaśyat striyau tantre adhiropya paṭaṁ vayantyau
mbh_01.003.148 tasmiṁś ca tantre kr̥ṣṇāḥ sitāś ca tantavaḥ
mbh_01.003.148 cakraṁ cāpaśyat ṣaḍbhiḥ kumāraiḥ parivartyamānam
mbh_01.003.148 puruṣaṁ cāpaśyad darśanīyam
mbh_01.003.149 sa tān sarvāṁs tuṣṭāva ebhir mantravādaślokaiḥ
mbh_01.003.150 trīṇy arpitāny atra śatāni madhye; ṣaṣṭiś ca nityaṁ carati dhruve ’smin
mbh_01.003.150 cakre caturviṁśatiparvayoge; ṣaḍ yat kumārāḥ parivartayanti
mbh_01.003.151 tantraṁ cedaṁ viśvarūpaṁ yuvatyau; vayatas tantūn satataṁ vartayantyau
mbh_01.003.151 kr̥ṣṇān sitāṁś caiva vivartayantyau; bhūtāny ajasraṁ bhuvanāni caiva
mbh_01.003.152 vajrasya bhartā bhuvanasya goptā; vr̥trasya hantā namucer nihantā
mbh_01.003.152 kr̥ṣṇe vasāno vasane mahātmā; satyānr̥te yo vivinakti loke
mbh_01.003.153 yo vājinaṁ garbham apāṁ purāṇaṁ; vaiśvānaraṁ vāhanam abhyupetaḥ
mbh_01.003.153 namaḥ sadāsmai jagadīśvarāya; lokatrayeśāya puraṁdarāya
mbh_01.003.154 tataḥ sa enaṁ puruṣaḥ prāha
mbh_01.003.154 prīto ’smi te ’ham anena stotreṇa
mbh_01.003.154 kiṁ te priyaṁ karavāṇīti
mbh_01.003.155 sa tam uvāca
mbh_01.003.155 nāgā me vaśam īyur iti
mbh_01.003.156 sa enaṁ puruṣaḥ punar uvāca
mbh_01.003.156 etam aśvam apāne dhamasveti
mbh_01.003.157 sa tam aśvam apāne ’dhamat
mbh_01.003.157 athāśvād dhamyamānāt sarvasrotobhyaḥ sadhūmā arciṣo ’gner niṣpetuḥ
mbh_01.003.158 tābhir nāgaloko dhūpitaḥ
mbh_01.003.159 atha sasaṁbhramas takṣako ’gnitejobhayaviṣaṇṇas te kuṇḍale gr̥hītvā sahasā svabhavanān niṣkramyottaṅkam uvāca
mbh_01.003.159 ete kuṇḍale pratigr̥hṇātu bhavān iti
mbh_01.003.160 sa te pratijagrāhottaṅkaḥ
mbh_01.003.160 kuṇḍale pratigr̥hyācintayat
mbh_01.003.160 adya tat puṇyakam upādhyāyinyāḥ
mbh_01.003.160 dūraṁ cāham abhyāgataḥ
mbh_01.003.160 kathaṁ nu khalu saṁbhāvayeyam iti
mbh_01.003.161 tata enaṁ cintayānam eva sa puruṣa uvāca
mbh_01.003.161 uttaṅka enam aśvam adhiroha
mbh_01.003.161 eṣa tvāṁ kṣaṇād evopādhyāyakulaṁ prāpayiṣyatīti
mbh_01.003.162 sa tathety uktvā tam aśvam adhiruhya pratyājagāmopādhyāyakulam
mbh_01.003.162 upādhyāyinī ca snātā keśān āvapayanty upaviṣṭottaṅko nāgacchatīti śāpāyāsya mano dadhe
mbh_01.003.163 athottaṅkaḥ praviśya upādhyāyinīm abhyavādayat
mbh_01.003.163 te cāsyai kuṇḍale prāyacchat
mbh_01.003.164 sā cainaṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.164 uttaṅka deśe kāle ’bhyāgataḥ
mbh_01.003.164 svāgataṁ te vatsa
mbh_01.003.164 manāg asi mayā na śaptaḥ
mbh_01.003.164 śreyas tavopasthitam
mbh_01.003.164 siddhim āpnuhīti
mbh_01.003.165 athottaṅka upādhyāyam abhyavādayat
mbh_01.003.165 tam upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.165 vatsottaṅka svāgataṁ te
mbh_01.003.165 kiṁ ciraṁ kr̥tam iti
mbh_01.003.166 tam uttaṅka upādhyāyaṁ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.166 bhos takṣakeṇa nāgarājena vighnaḥ kr̥to ’smin karmaṇi
mbh_01.003.166 tenāsmi nāgalokaṁ nītaḥ
mbh_01.003.167 tatra ca mayā dr̥ṣṭe striyau tantre ’dhiropya paṭaṁ vayantyau
mbh_01.003.167 tasmiṁś ca tantre kr̥ṣṇāḥ sitāś ca tantavaḥ
mbh_01.003.167 kiṁ tat
mbh_01.003.168 tatra ca mayā cakraṁ dr̥ṣṭaṁ dvādaśāram
mbh_01.003.168 ṣaṭ cainaṁ kumārāḥ parivartayanti
mbh_01.003.168 tad api kim
mbh_01.003.169 puruṣaś cāpi mayā dr̥ṣṭaḥ
mbh_01.003.169 sa punaḥ kaḥ
mbh_01.003.170 aśvaś cātipramāṇayuktaḥ
mbh_01.003.170 sa cāpi kaḥ
mbh_01.003.171 pathi gacchatā mayā r̥ṣabho dr̥ṣṭaḥ
mbh_01.003.171 taṁ ca puruṣo ’dhirūḍhaḥ
mbh_01.003.171 tenāsmi sopacāram uktaḥ
mbh_01.003.171 uttaṅkāsya r̥ṣabhasya purīṣaṁ bhakṣaya
mbh_01.003.171 upādhyāyenāpi te bhakṣitam iti
mbh_01.003.171 tatas tadvacanān mayā tadr̥ṣabhasya purīṣam upayuktam
mbh_01.003.171 tad icchāmi bhavatopadiṣṭaṁ kiṁ tad iti
mbh_01.003.172 tenaivam ukta upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca
mbh_01.003.172 ye te striyau dhātā vidhātā ca
mbh_01.003.172 ye ca te kr̥ṣṇāḥ sitāś ca tantavas te rātryahanī
mbh_01.003.173 yad api tac cakraṁ dvādaśāraṁ ṣaṭ kumārāḥ parivartayanti te r̥tavaḥ ṣaṭ saṁvatsaraś cakram
mbh_01.003.173 yaḥ puruṣaḥ sa parjanyaḥ
mbh_01.003.173 yo ’śvaḥ so ’gniḥ
mbh_01.003.174 ya r̥ṣabhas tvayā pathi gacchatā dr̥ṣṭaḥ sa airāvato nāgarājaḥ
mbh_01.003.174 yaś cainam adhirūḍhaḥ sa indraḥ
mbh_01.003.174 yad api te purīṣaṁ bhakṣitaṁ tasya r̥ṣabhasya tad amr̥tam
mbh_01.003.175 tena khalv asi na vyāpannas tasmin nāgabhavane
mbh_01.003.175 sa cāpi mama sakhā indraḥ
mbh_01.003.176 tadanugrahāt kuṇḍale gr̥hītvā punar abhyāgato ’si
mbh_01.003.176 tat saumya gamyatām
mbh_01.003.176 anujāne bhavantam
mbh_01.003.176 śreyo ’vāpsyasīti
mbh_01.003.177 sa upādhyāyenānujñāta uttaṅkaḥ kruddhas takṣakasya praticikīrṣamāṇo hāstinapuraṁ pratasthe
mbh_01.003.178 sa hāstinapuraṁ prāpya nacirād dvijasattamaḥ
mbh_01.003.178 samāgacchata rājānam uttaṅko janamejayam
mbh_01.003.179 purā takṣaśilātas taṁ nivr̥ttam aparājitam
mbh_01.003.179 samyag vijayinaṁ dr̥ṣṭvā samantān mantribhir vr̥tam
mbh_01.003.180 tasmai jayāśiṣaḥ pūrvaṁ yathānyāyaṁ prayujya saḥ
mbh_01.003.180 uvācainaṁ vacaḥ kāle śabdasaṁpannayā girā
mbh_01.003.181 anyasmin karaṇīye tvaṁ kārye pārthivasattama
mbh_01.003.181 bālyād ivānyad eva tvaṁ kuruṣe nr̥pasattama
mbh_01.003.182 evam uktas tu vipreṇa sa rājā pratyuvāca ha
mbh_01.003.182 janamejayaḥ prasannātmā samyak saṁpūjya taṁ munim
mbh_01.003.183 āsāṁ prajānāṁ paripālanena; svaṁ kṣatradharmaṁ paripālayāmi
mbh_01.003.183 prabrūhi vā kiṁ kriyatāṁ dvijendra; śuśrūṣur asmy adya vacas tvadīyam
mbh_01.003.184 sa evam uktas tu nr̥pottamena; dvijottamaḥ puṇyakr̥tāṁ variṣṭhaḥ
mbh_01.003.184 uvāca rājānam adīnasattvaṁ; svam eva kāryaṁ nr̥pateś ca yat tat
mbh_01.003.185 takṣakeṇa narendrendra yena te hiṁsitaḥ pitā
mbh_01.003.185 tasmai pratikuruṣva tvaṁ pannagāya durātmane
mbh_01.003.186 kāryakālaṁ ca manye ’haṁ vidhidr̥ṣṭasya karmaṇaḥ

mbh_01.003.187 tena hy anaparādhī sa daṣṭo duṣṭāntarātmanā
mbh_01.003.187 pañcatvam agamad rājā vajrāhata iva drumaḥ
mbh_01.003.188 baladarpasamutsiktas takṣakaḥ pannagādhamaḥ
mbh_01.003.188 akāryaṁ kr̥tavān pāpo yo ’daśat pitaraṁ tava
mbh_01.003.189 rājarṣivaṁśagoptāram amarapratimaṁ nr̥pam
