## Chapter: Mahabharata — Parva 1, Chapter 4
<<<
mbh_01.004.001 lomaharṣaṇaputra ugraśravāḥ sūtaḥ paurāṇiko naimiṣāraṇye śaunakasya kulapater dvādaśavārṣike satre r̥ṣīn abhyāgatān upatasthe
mbh_01.004.002 paurāṇikaḥ purāṇe kr̥taśramaḥ sa tān kr̥tāñjalir uvāca
mbh_01.004.002 kiṁ bhavantaḥ śrotum icchanti
mbh_01.004.002 kim ahaṁ bruvāṇīti
mbh_01.004.003 tam r̥ṣaya ūcuḥ
mbh_01.004.003 paramaṁ lomaharṣaṇe prakṣyāmas tvāṁ vakṣyasi ca naḥ śuśrūṣatāṁ kathāyogam
mbh_01.004.003 tad bhagavāṁs tu tāvac chaunako ’gniśaraṇam adhyāste
mbh_01.004.004 yo ’sau divyāḥ kathā veda devatāsurasaṁkathāḥ
mbh_01.004.004 manuṣyoragagandharvakathā veda ca sarvaśaḥ
mbh_01.004.005 sa cāpy asmin makhe saute vidvān kulapatir dvijaḥ
mbh_01.004.005 dakṣo dhr̥tavrato dhīmāñ śāstre cāraṇyake guruḥ
mbh_01.004.006 satyavādī śamaparas tapasvī niyatavrataḥ
mbh_01.004.006 sarveṣām eva no mānyaḥ sa tāvat pratipālyatām
mbh_01.004.007 tasminn adhyāsati gurāv āsanaṁ paramārcitam
mbh_01.004.007 tato vakṣyasi yat tvāṁ sa prakṣyati dvijasattamaḥ
mbh_01.004.008 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.004.008 evam astu gurau tasminn upaviṣṭe mahātmani
mbh_01.004.008 tena pr̥ṣṭaḥ kathāḥ puṇyā vakṣyāmi vividhāśrayāḥ
mbh_01.004.009 so ’tha viprarṣabhaḥ kāryaṁ kr̥tvā sarvaṁ yathākramam
mbh_01.004.009 devān vāgbhiḥ pitr̥̄n adbhis tarpayitvājagāma ha
mbh_01.004.010 yatra brahmarṣayaḥ siddhās ta āsīnā yatavratāḥ
mbh_01.004.010 yajñāyatanam āśritya sūtaputrapuraḥsarāḥ
mbh_01.004.011 r̥tvikṣv atha sadasyeṣu sa vai gr̥hapatis tataḥ
mbh_01.004.011 upaviṣṭeṣūpaviṣṭaḥ śaunako ’thābravīd idam

mbh_01.005.024 matpūrvabhāryāpahr̥tā bhr̥guṇānr̥takāriṇā
mbh_01.005.024 seyaṁ yadi tathā me tvaṁ satyam ākhyātum arhasi
mbh_01.005.025 śrutvā tvatto bhr̥gor bhāryāṁ hariṣyāmy aham āśramāt
mbh_01.005.025 jātavedaḥ paśyatas te vada satyāṁ giraṁ mama
mbh_01.005.026 tasya tad vacanaṁ śrutvā saptārcir duḥkhito bhr̥śam

mbh_01.006.001 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.006.001 agner atha vacaḥ śrutvā tad rakṣaḥ prajahāra tām
mbh_01.006.001 brahman varāharūpeṇa manomārutaraṁhasā
mbh_01.006.002 tataḥ sa garbho nivasan kukṣau bhr̥gukulodvaha
mbh_01.006.002 roṣān mātuś cyutaḥ kukṣeś cyavanas tena so ’bhavat
mbh_01.006.003 taṁ dr̥ṣṭvā mātur udarāc cyutam ādityavarcasam
mbh_01.006.003 tad rakṣo bhasmasād bhūtaṁ papāta parimucya tām
mbh_01.006.004 sā tam ādāya suśroṇī sasāra bhr̥gunandanam
mbh_01.006.004 cyavanaṁ bhārgavaṁ brahman pulomā duḥkhamūrcchitā
mbh_01.006.005 tāṁ dadarśa svayaṁ brahmā sarvalokapitāmahaḥ
mbh_01.006.005 rudatīṁ bāṣpapūrṇākṣīṁ bhr̥gor bhāryām aninditām
mbh_01.006.005 sāntvayām āsa bhagavān vadhūṁ brahmā pitāmahaḥ
mbh_01.006.006 aśrubindūdbhavā tasyāḥ prāvartata mahānadī
mbh_01.006.006 anuvartatī sr̥tiṁ tasyā bhr̥goḥ patnyā yaśasvinaḥ
mbh_01.006.007 tasyā mārgaṁ sr̥tavatīṁ dr̥ṣṭvā tu saritaṁ tadā
mbh_01.006.007 nāma tasyās tadā nadyāś cakre lokapitāmahaḥ
mbh_01.006.007 vadhūsareti bhagavāṁś cyavanasyāśramaṁ prati
mbh_01.006.008 sa evaṁ cyavano jajñe bhr̥goḥ putraḥ pratāpavān
mbh_01.006.008 taṁ dadarśa pitā tatra cyavanaṁ tāṁ ca bhāminīm
mbh_01.006.009 sa pulomāṁ tato bhāryāṁ papraccha kupito bhr̥guḥ
mbh_01.006.009 kenāsi rakṣase tasmai kathiteha jihīrṣave
mbh_01.006.009 na hi tvāṁ veda tad rakṣo madbhāryāṁ cāruhāsinīm
mbh_01.006.010 tat tvam ākhyāhi taṁ hy adya śaptum icchāmy ahaṁ ruṣā
mbh_01.006.010 bibheti ko na śāpān me kasya cāyaṁ vyatikramaḥ
mbh_01.006.011 pulomovāca
mbh_01.006.011 agninā bhagavaṁs tasmai rakṣase ’haṁ niveditā
mbh_01.006.011 tato mām anayad rakṣaḥ krośantīṁ kurarīm iva
mbh_01.006.012 sāhaṁ tava sutasyāsya tejasā parimokṣitā
mbh_01.006.012 bhasmībhūtaṁ ca tad rakṣo mām utsr̥jya papāta vai
mbh_01.006.013 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.006.013 iti śrutvā pulomāyā bhr̥guḥ paramamanyumān

## Chapter: Mahabharata — Parva 1, Chapter 7
<<<
mbh_01.007.001 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.007.001 śaptas tu bhr̥guṇā vahniḥ kruddho vākyam athābravīt
mbh_01.007.001 kim idaṁ sāhasaṁ brahman kr̥tavān asi sāṁpratam
mbh_01.007.002 dharme prayatamānasya satyaṁ ca vadataḥ samam
mbh_01.007.002 pr̥ṣṭo yad abruvaṁ satyaṁ vyabhicāro ’tra ko mama
mbh_01.007.003 pr̥ṣṭo hi sākṣī yaḥ sākṣyaṁ jānamāno ’nyathā vadet
mbh_01.007.003 sa pūrvān ātmanaḥ sapta kule hanyāt tathā parān
mbh_01.007.004 yaś ca kāryārthatattvajño jānamāno na bhāṣate
mbh_01.007.004 so ’pi tenaiva pāpena lipyate nātra saṁśayaḥ
mbh_01.007.005 śakto ’ham api śaptuṁ tvāṁ mānyās tu brāhmaṇā mama
mbh_01.007.005 jānato ’pi ca te vyaktaṁ kathayiṣye nibodha tat
mbh_01.007.006 yogena bahudhātmānaṁ kr̥tvā tiṣṭhāmi mūrtiṣu
mbh_01.007.006 agnihotreṣu satreṣu kriyāsv atha makheṣu ca
mbh_01.007.007 vedoktena vidhānena mayi yad dhūyate haviḥ
mbh_01.007.007 devatāḥ pitaraś caiva tena tr̥ptā bhavanti vai
mbh_01.007.008 āpo devagaṇāḥ sarve āpaḥ pitr̥gaṇās tathā
mbh_01.007.008 darśaś ca paurṇamāsaś ca devānāṁ pitr̥bhiḥ saha
mbh_01.007.009 devatāḥ pitaras tasmāt pitaraś cāpi devatāḥ
mbh_01.007.009 ekībhūtāś ca pūjyante pr̥thaktvena ca parvasu
mbh_01.007.010 devatāḥ pitaraś caiva juhvate mayi yat sadā
mbh_01.007.010 tridaśānāṁ pitr̥̄ṇāṁ ca mukham evam ahaṁ smr̥taḥ
mbh_01.007.011 amāvāsyāṁ ca pitaraḥ paurṇamāsyāṁ ca devatāḥ
mbh_01.007.011 manmukhenaiva hūyante bhuñjate ca hutaṁ haviḥ
mbh_01.007.011 sarvabhakṣaḥ kathaṁ teṣāṁ bhaviṣyāmi mukhaṁ tv aham
mbh_01.007.012 cintayitvā tato vahniś cakre saṁhāram ātmanaḥ
mbh_01.007.012 dvijānām agnihotreṣu yajñasatrakriyāsu ca
mbh_01.007.013 niroṁkāravaṣaṭkārāḥ svadhāsvāhāvivarjitāḥ
mbh_01.007.013 vināgninā prajāḥ sarvās tata āsan suduḥkhitāḥ
mbh_01.007.014 atharṣayaḥ samudvignā devān gatvābruvan vacaḥ
mbh_01.007.014 agnināśāt kriyābhraṁśād bhrāntā lokās trayo ’naghāḥ
mbh_01.007.014 vidhadhvam atra yat kāryaṁ na syāt kālātyayo yathā
mbh_01.007.015 atharṣayaś ca devāś ca brahmāṇam upagamya tu
mbh_01.007.015 agner āvedayañ śāpaṁ kriyāsaṁhāram eva ca
mbh_01.007.016 bhr̥guṇā vai mahābhāga śapto ’gniḥ kāraṇāntare
mbh_01.007.016 kathaṁ devamukho bhūtvā yajñabhāgāgrabhuk tathā
mbh_01.007.016 hutabhuk sarvalokeṣu sarvabhakṣatvam eṣyati
mbh_01.007.017 śrutvā tu tad vacas teṣām agnim āhūya lokakr̥t
mbh_01.007.017 uvāca vacanaṁ ślakṣṇaṁ bhūtabhāvanam avyayam
mbh_01.007.018 lokānām iha sarveṣāṁ tvaṁ kartā cānta eva ca
mbh_01.007.018 tvaṁ dhārayasi lokāṁs trīn kriyāṇāṁ ca pravartakaḥ
mbh_01.007.018 sa tathā kuru lokeśa nocchidyeran kriyā yathā
mbh_01.007.019 kasmād evaṁ vimūḍhas tvam īśvaraḥ san hutāśanaḥ
mbh_01.007.019 tvaṁ pavitraṁ yadā loke sarvabhūtagataś ca ha
mbh_01.007.020 na tvaṁ sarvaśarīreṇa sarvabhakṣatvam eṣyasi
mbh_01.007.020 upādāne ’rciṣo yās te sarvaṁ dhakṣyanti tāḥ śikhin
mbh_01.007.021 yathā sūryāṁśubhiḥ spr̥ṣṭaṁ sarvaṁ śuci vibhāvyate
mbh_01.007.021 tathā tvadarcirnirdagdhaṁ sarvaṁ śuci bhaviṣyati
mbh_01.007.022 tad agne tvaṁ mahat tejaḥ svaprabhāvād vinirgatam
mbh_01.007.022 svatejasaiva taṁ śāpaṁ kuru satyam r̥ṣer vibho
mbh_01.007.022 devānāṁ cātmano bhāgaṁ gr̥hāṇa tvaṁ mukhe hutam
mbh_01.007.023 evam astv iti taṁ vahniḥ pratyuvāca pitāmaham
mbh_01.007.023 jagāma śāsanaṁ kartuṁ devasya parameṣṭhinaḥ
mbh_01.007.024 devarṣayaś ca muditās tato jagmur yathāgatam
mbh_01.007.024 r̥ṣayaś ca yathāpūrvaṁ kriyāḥ sarvāḥ pracakrire
mbh_01.007.025 divi devā mumudire bhūtasaṁghāś ca laukikāḥ
mbh_01.007.025 agniś ca paramāṁ prītim avāpa hatakalmaṣaḥ
mbh_01.007.026 evam eṣa purāvr̥tta itihāso ’gniśāpajaḥ
mbh_01.007.026 pulomasya vināśaś ca cyavanasya ca saṁbhavaḥ

## Chapter: Mahabharata — Parva 1, Chapter 8
<<<
mbh_01.008.001 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.008.001 sa cāpi cyavano brahman bhārgavo ’janayat sutam
mbh_01.008.001 sukanyāyāṁ mahātmānaṁ pramatiṁ dīptatejasam
mbh_01.008.002 pramatis tu ruruṁ nāma ghr̥tācyāṁ samajījanat
mbh_01.008.002 ruruḥ pramadvarāyāṁ tu śunakaṁ samajījanat
mbh_01.008.003 tasya brahman ruroḥ sarvaṁ caritaṁ bhūritejasaḥ
mbh_01.008.003 vistareṇa pravakṣyāmi tac chr̥ṇu tvam aśeṣataḥ
mbh_01.008.004 r̥ṣir āsīn mahān pūrvaṁ tapovidyāsamanvitaḥ
mbh_01.008.004 sthūlakeśa iti khyātaḥ sarvabhūtahite rataḥ
mbh_01.008.005 etasminn eva kāle tu menakāyāṁ prajajñivān
mbh_01.008.005 gandharvarājo viprarṣe viśvāvasur iti śrutaḥ
mbh_01.008.006 athāpsarā menakā sā taṁ garbhaṁ bhr̥gunandana
mbh_01.008.006 utsasarja yathākālaṁ sthūlakeśāśramaṁ prati
mbh_01.008.007 utsr̥jya caiva taṁ garbhaṁ nadyās tīre jagāma ha
mbh_01.008.007 kanyām amaragarbhābhāṁ jvalantīm iva ca śriyā
mbh_01.008.008 tāṁ dadarśa samutsr̥ṣṭāṁ nadītīre mahān r̥ṣiḥ
mbh_01.008.008 sthūlakeśaḥ sa tejasvī vijane bandhuvarjitām
mbh_01.008.009 sa tāṁ dr̥ṣṭvā tadā kanyāṁ sthūlakeśo dvijottamaḥ
mbh_01.008.009 jagrāhātha muniśreṣṭhaḥ kr̥pāviṣṭaḥ pupoṣa ca
mbh_01.008.009 vavr̥dhe sā varārohā tasyāśramapade śubhā
mbh_01.008.010 pramadābhyo varā sā tu sarvarūpaguṇānvitā
mbh_01.008.010 tataḥ pramadvarety asyā nāma cakre mahān r̥ṣiḥ
mbh_01.008.011 tām āśramapade tasya rurur dr̥ṣṭvā pramadvarām
mbh_01.008.011 babhūva kila dharmātmā madanānugatātmavān
mbh_01.008.012 pitaraṁ sakhibhiḥ so ’tha vācayām āsa bhārgavaḥ
mbh_01.008.012 pramatiś cābhyayāc chrutvā sthūlakeśaṁ yaśasvinam
mbh_01.008.013 tataḥ prādāt pitā kanyāṁ rurave tāṁ pramadvarām
mbh_01.008.013 vivāhaṁ sthāpayitvāgre nakṣatre bhagadaivate
mbh_01.008.014 tataḥ katipayāhasya vivāhe samupasthite
mbh_01.008.014 sakhībhiḥ krīḍatī sārdhaṁ sā kanyā varavarṇinī
mbh_01.008.015 nāpaśyata prasuptaṁ vai bhujagaṁ tiryag āyatam
mbh_01.008.015 padā cainaṁ samākrāman mumūrṣuḥ kālacoditā
mbh_01.008.016 sa tasyāḥ saṁpramattāyāś coditaḥ kāladharmaṇā
mbh_01.008.016 viṣopaliptān daśanān bhr̥śam aṅge nyapātayat
mbh_01.008.017 sā daṣṭā sahasā bhūmau patitā gatacetanā
mbh_01.008.017 vyasur aprekṣaṇīyāpi prekṣaṇīyatamākr̥tiḥ
mbh_01.008.018 prasuptevābhavac cāpi bhuvi sarpaviṣārditā
mbh_01.008.018 bhūyo manoharatarā babhūva tanumadhyamā
mbh_01.008.019 dadarśa tāṁ pitā caiva te caivānye tapasvinaḥ
mbh_01.008.019 viceṣṭamānāṁ patitāṁ bhūtale padmavarcasam
mbh_01.008.020 tataḥ sarve dvijavarāḥ samājagmuḥ kr̥pānvitāḥ
mbh_01.008.020 svastyātreyo mahājānuḥ kuśikaḥ śaṅkhamekhalaḥ
mbh_01.008.021 bhāradvājaḥ kauṇakutsa ārṣṭiṣeṇo ’tha gautamaḥ
mbh_01.008.021 pramatiḥ saha putreṇa tathānye vanavāsinaḥ
mbh_01.008.022 tāṁ te kanyāṁ vyasuṁ dr̥ṣṭvā bhujagasya viṣārditām
mbh_01.008.022 ruruduḥ kr̥payāviṣṭā rurus tv ārto bahir yayau
